desc_EN: Currency issued by United Mining. It became increasingly important in Thousand Peaks' economic system and infiltrated basically every aspect of daily life.
desc_CHS: 矿联发行的货币，在群山的经济体系逐渐占据重要角色，生活中很难避免。
shop_desc_EN: Currency issued by United Mining. It became increasingly important in Thousand Peaks' economic system and infiltrated basically every aspect of daily life.
shop_desc_CHS: 矿联发行的货币，在群山的经济体系占据重要角色，生活中很难避免。

desc_EN:
"Raise thy scepter, and play the song of stars."

Even to this day, the precepts passed down during my training as a cave runner remain clear in my mind.
desc_CHS:
拿好仿声器，于天地间重现龙的轰鸣。
...
直到今天，我依然记得作为瀛海同盟的探勘人，受训时所受的箴言。

desc_EN:
It was a long time before I found out that Remi was an orphan of the war. Initially, she was taken in by a United Mining foster family, but they refused to give her tools. "Those aren't for girls," they would say.

Not long after that, she ran off to live in the docks by herself. These tools reminded her of that time in her life.
desc_CHS:
我很久后才知道，菈米亚作为战争孤儿，先被矿业联合的家庭扶养，但对方不愿意买五金相关的工具给她。

「女孩子，碰这会疼。」听完没多久，她就一人逃到码头住了下来，这工具组会让她想起那段往事。
shop_desc_EN:
United Mining's latest product, it's the perfect choice for a technician like you.

Steel lumen alloy cast at 9000 degrees. The exterior is anti-rust treated, meticulously polished, and smooth as butter.

Includes the following tools: Claw Hammer, Hex Key, Different Sized Sockets
shop_desc_CHS:
行星矿业联合全新出品，技师的最佳选择
汜合金钢高温9000度锻造
表面精细抛光，防锈处理，手感舒适
内部配置：羊角锤、六角扳手、多尺寸套筒

desc_CHS: 装甲初始数据，游戏不显示

desc_EN: Temporarily coating a ship with refined lumium would greatly increase its resistance against attacks. During the war, the Ring Liberation Front had plenty of lumen, but were lacking military technology, so they'd apply coatings like this on their cobbled together ships.
desc_CHS:
用汜提炼的临时涂料，能有效地改善船舰的对冲击的抗性。
当年持有龙脉，却没有军事技术力的星环自由战线，会用这种涂料来强化他们拼装的船只。
shop_desc_EN:
[Trash Mountain Recycled Product] 
Manufactured by the R.L.F. in 8513

Wanna be an asteroid belt hero? Highly durable against attacks, takes effect in just half a standard hour, and effectively enhances vessel armor.
shop_desc_CHS:
[垃圾山回收二手品] 
本品项由星环自由战线于8513年制造

向往当年小行星带的英雄？
高耐冲击性、高耐磨损
涂装仅需半标准时
让你有效强化飞船防护能力

desc_CHS: 因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.

desc_EN: Special provisions made by Zhao Ghe Resources. The lumium additives increased endurance, concentration, and other physical attributes. After Zhao Ghe left Thousand Peaks, you could only find them among the ruins.
desc_CHS:
朝歌汜气能源集团生产的特殊口粮，混合了独门的汜气添加剂，可以增加忍受力、专注力和体能表现。
但随着朝歌在冲突后退出群山，如今只有废墟中可见。
shop_desc_EN: Due to the rise of the post-war scavenging industry, this is a common find in the ruins.
shop_desc_CHS: 龙脉冲突后由于拾荒业兴起，废墟中挖掘的交易品随手可见。

desc_CHS: 未持有特定检定道具时，基本的参数，不显示于collection
因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.

desc_EN:
"This is what United Mining and Zhao Ghe were fighting over..."

The doctor was the one who told me about this. During the war, United Mining was worried that lumium simulation technology would be used for military purposes, so they ordered her and Red to intercept Zhao Ghe's chip transport vessels.
desc_CHS:
「这芯片是矿联跟朝歌的战争主因...」
医生跟我们提过这过往，当年矿联军方担心汜气模拟技术被拿去做军事利用，才会命她跟红拦截对方的芯片运输船。
shop_desc_EN:
Lumen Association Recycled (Good Condition)

Salvaged from Lumen Association airspace debris. Please consult with a technician before purchasing.

[Manufacturer: Zhao Ghe Resources]
11th generation quantum chip that features a complex ecosystem generator. Simulated lumen environments are 98.76% accurate.
shop_desc_CHS:
龙脉协会回收品：七成新未整理
本品项打捞自龙脉冲突残骸空域
购买前请与技术人员确认

[朝歌汜气能源集团制造]
第11代量子芯片，可演算复杂生态网
龙脉环境模拟测试高达 98.76%

desc_CHS: 因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.
因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.

desc_EN:
On the first page, in big letters it read:

"Myria neverlasting, serve none but the flower within."

A book of reflections on the war, written by the United Mining war hero Red. It quickly became a classic among the new era witches, and is filled with a yearning for atonement.
desc_CHS:
第一页几个大字写着：

「万道无常，花开唯心。」

矿业联合战争英雄红，一手所撰写的战时回忆录，最终成为新生代女巫的经典，通篇充满赎罪的味道。

desc_EN:
8 Orbis, 1 Circum, 17 Gradus
Praesidio Composes Thus

In the hopes of reunion,
I shall hide Terra among Excidium.
And use flowers as form,
to reforge her spirit.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守谱于
八轮一天十七地

为求再见之日，
将藏后土于大荒，
以花为身，重炼后土之魂。

desc_EN:
Left: Office Area
Right: Telescope Control Room 
Below: Computing Center
desc_CHS:
左：办公空间
右：辐射望远镜控制室
下：计算中心机房

desc_EN:
Miniature Black Hole UA115
Known by Peakers as "Excidium"

Located on the outskirts of the Thousand Peaks' solar system, where there weren't any lumen astronomical bodies. In Myrian mythology, this is where Ignis sent those who had been banished.
desc_CHS:
超小型质量黑洞UA115，
群山民间称为「大荒」。

位于群山太阳系的外围，那里没有任何龙脉天体，是万道神话中被烛龙放逐之地。

desc_EN: Sometimes I wonder if it would have been better if we never received this message.
desc_CHS: 有时我会认为，如果当初没有收到这个讯号，会不会对我们好一点。

desc_EN:
Initially used as a microprocessor for automatic storage units, this technology was replaced after the war. Nowadays they can only be found in post-war ruins or secondhand shops... if you're lucky.

Sometimes I wondered if Remi had installed a few of these on Red Chamber's cameras.
desc_CHS:
被应用在自动格纳库的微型处理器，龙脉冲突后，相关技术被汰换，现在要找到只有战场废墟，或二手商店才能碰碰运气。

我有时怀疑，菈米亚是不是在红楼的摄像头也装了这些。
shop_desc_EN:
[United Mining Certified Antique]
Supplies are limited.

Manufactured by United Mining, the built-in neural network algorithmic core is easy to customize. Suited for most automated control systems, this processor makes vessel maintenance and management a breeze.
shop_desc_CHS:
[矿联认证中古货]
数量有限，售完不补

行星矿业联合制造
内建类神经演算核心，程序编写容易
适用各种自动控制系统
减轻船舰维护与管理负担

desc_EN: After I returned home, I often wondered if things would have been different had I noticed that Eda was subconsciously avoiding Banshee.
desc_CHS: 回瀛海后我常回想，如果那时，我有注意到艾妲下意识的回避寻找黑龙，这一切会不会不一样。

desc_EN:
8 Orbis, 10 Circum, 2 Gradus
Praesidio Composes Thus

You have left.
I shall sing alone,
to contain these chaotic flames,
waiting for an eternity for the flowers to bloom,
just to see you again.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守谱于
八轮十天二地

汝已逝，孤将独自行歌，
以控天火乱象，仅待万轮花开，
与汝再见之时。
shop_desc_EN: The intel markets are happy to purchase all sorts of documents. What looks like useless information might one day reveal some hidden treasures.

desc_EN: Large plates of alloy weren't hard to find in the ruins of abandoned space stations. In Thousand Peaks, just about everything needed to be repaired, which meant it was pretty easy to find a buyer.
desc_CHS: 从冲突后的废弃空间站上找到的大片合金，在到处都有东西需要修补的群山，很容易找到买家。
shop_desc_EN: Due to the rise of the post-war scavenging industry, this is a common find in the ruins.
shop_desc_CHS: 龙脉冲突后由于拾荒业兴起，废墟中挖掘的交易品随手可见。

desc_EN:
Captain: Edalune Grant
Ship ID: HON20225-XO
Class: QBC-OPUS-03 Lumen Seeking Vessel
Expiration Date: N/A
Valid Region: Thousand Peaks
desc_CHS:
船长：艾妲拉姆・葛兰特
船ID：HON20225-XO
级别：QBC-OPUS-03 龙脉探测船

有效日期：无限
有效区域：群山全境

name_CHS: 座标：非法回收站「垃圾山」
name_CHT: 座標：非法回收站「垃圾山」
desc_EN: Eda's speech device was an antique from the war. There weren't many places where you could find one, but she took good care of it. If I hadn't heard her voice suddenly cut out, I wouldn't have noticed that her throat was damaged.
desc_CHS: 艾妲的声音辅具是战时的古董，没有多少地方找得到，但她很仔细地维护，如果不是听到她突然声音发不出，我不会意识到她喉咙曾有受伤。

desc_EN:
A white and blue origami flower with seeds folded inside of it. After Eda's master began professing unorthodox beliefs, this was how the exiled witches who followed her were able to identify each other.

They believed that so long as you listened to your soul, it would one day blossom.
desc_CHS:
一白一蓝的纸被折成花的形状，里面封着种子，是艾妲的师父「红」叛道后，那些愿意追随她信念的流亡女巫，彼此用来相识的信物。

她们认为只要专心聆听自己，象征灵魂的种子终会发芽，成花绽放。

desc_EN:
"Ignis above, may your spirit go in peace, and return as light as light."

A prayer for the soul, written in Myrian runes, was elegantly arranged on the outside of the cabin. The inhabitants of the asteroids, using post-war wreckage, would piece together a cabin to use as a ship for the deceased's return to Ignis.
desc_CHS:
烛龙在上，
愿灵魂归去无伤，归来如光。
...
舱体外侧，万道符文撰写的灵魂祷词优雅的排列。小行星的居民，会用战后的残骸拼凑出一个还堪用的舱体，作为他们回归烛龙的船。
shop_desc_EN: In the Peaker markets, you can find a buyer for anything if you have the right contact.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山的市场上，只要有门道，几乎什么东西都能找到收购者。

desc_EN: When the resonating frequency of lumen is high enough, it will become highly active, giving it a reddish tint. If this causes a gas explosion, you'll see small bits of shattered lumenite like this.
desc_CHS: 汜这种能源，共鸣的频率过高时，高度活性后会转为红色，如果引发气爆，就会于现场看见这些粉碎的颗粒。
shop_desc_EN: A lumen crystal found in the depths of caves that lies somewhere between a mineral and an artifact. Depending on its purity, it can be pretty valuable in the markets.
shop_desc_CHS:
龙脉深处的汜晶体，介于文物与矿物之间
依据纯度，在市场有不同流通价格。

desc_EN: In Thousand Peaks, everyone loved hearing terrible memories. Perhaps it made their own misery seem more bearable.
desc_CHS: 在群山，大家总喜欢听些糟糕的回忆，让自己显得好过点。
shop_desc_EN: In Thousand Peaks, even a failed excavation mission is seen as valuable intel that might make up for past losses.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山，探勘失败的经验被视作一种情报，有时也弥足珍贵

desc_EN: Not many people could survive these encounters, which made the memories that much more valuable.
desc_CHS: 很少人能在经历这些后还活下来，回忆变得弥足珍贵。
shop_desc_EN: In Thousand Peaks, even a failed excavation mission is seen as valuable intel that might make up for past losses.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山，探勘失败的经验被视作一种情报，有时也弥足珍贵

desc_EN:
A recording by James Wong, a famous Myrian explorer:

"I hope that my words can be passed on... I've inhaled too much lumen and my consciousness is fading in and out...

I suspect that Ignis is not a god, but a sun, abundant in lumen... Its solar flares are lumen's extradimensional thundering, carrying the potential to create lumen... or destroy it. This is how Myria was destroyed... Th-They... They're coming for me again..."

(Rest of recording unintelligible)
desc_CHS:
录音的来源是詹姆斯・王
有名的万道探险家
...
希望有人把我的话传下去...吸食太多汜...我渐渐意识不清楚了...

我怀疑烛龙不是神，只是蕴藏汜的太阳...它的闪焰是汜高维度的轰鸣，可以创造...与毁灭龙脉...这就是万道毁灭的...啊...我又看到...是它们...来找我...

（以下声音无法辨识）
shop_desc_EN: The intel markets are happy to purchase all sorts of documents. What looks like useless information might one day reveal some hidden treasures.

desc_EN:
A text detailing Myria's god of the underworld, Excidium. A black hole deity, Excidium is the reflection of Ignis, the sun. Lord of the underworld and afterlife, he is cold and barren to all who enter. The text is full of warning, advising people towards the moral path.

Not many Myrian believers worship this cruel deity, and those that do are usually people with dubious professions. People like assassins and excavators who destroy the shrines...
desc_CHS:
书中记载万道的阴间之神「大荒」，它是与恒星烛龙相对的黑洞之神，掌管万道的死后世界，对来者无情荒凉，通篇多少有警世，劝人向善的成分。

面对如此冷酷之神，唯有少数万道信众会信仰，他们多半从事见不得光照的行业，像是杀手、或是破坏龙脉神殿的盗采者...

desc_EN: You could find all sorts of old or broken electronic components in post-war ruins. In places where raw material was rare, they were a valuable product in the markets.
desc_CHS: 龙脉冲突后，废墟间多半有各种破旧电子组件，在某些原料稀少的地区成为珍贵的交易品。
shop_desc_EN: Due to the rise of the post-war scavenging industry, this is a common find in the ruins. Given their prevalence, they're pretty easy to sell.
shop_desc_CHS: 龙脉冲突后由于拾荒业兴起，废墟中挖掘的交易品随手可见，具有一定的流通性，变卖很容易。

desc_EN:
Sometimes runners would find lumen in the shape of what looked like a human figure. 

Myrian scholars suggest that the gods, who were formed of lumen, would leave these elegant crystals behind when they passed away.
desc_CHS:
探索时，有时会拾获人型的龙脉结晶体。

万道的学者说，那是由龙脉成形的古老诸神，死后形成的瑰丽结晶。
shop_desc_EN: A lumen crystal found in the depths of a cave that's both a mineral and an artifact. Depending on its purity, it could be pretty valuable in the markets.
shop_desc_CHS:
龙脉深处的汜晶体，介于文物与矿物之间
依据纯度，在市场有不同流通价格。

desc_CHS: 因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.

desc_EN:
This songbook tells the myth of the Myrian deity Terra. It relays how she taught the gods to sing, and how the Sanctums sang to transform the planets, making the lands fertile and full of flowers. This was how the magnificent Myrian Empire was established. 

Terra was worshipped by the Witching Tower, but after its loss of influence following the war, these books became difficult to find.

It also appears to contain decipherments of Myrian inscriptions.
desc_CHS:
书中记载的是万道诸神「后土」的神话。

描述后土教导歌法的善行，而众道如何透过歌法改造行星，让土地丰饶，花满山谷，打造壮丽的万道帝国。

它是巫塔信奉之神明，但由于巫塔在龙脉冲突后势力不在，这些书很难找了。

似乎记载着万道符文解译的方法。
shop_desc_EN:
Wartime Relic (Poor Condition)

Pages are seriously damaged. Ideal for a researcher of witch history or anyone that's interested. This shop sells and recycles wartime debris. Our products in no way represent that we have any affiliation with witches or Terra beliefs.
shop_desc_CHS:
战后废弃物（三成新）
书页毁损严重
寻有缘人，女巫历史研究者
本商店仅提供废弃资源回收与出清，
不代表与女巫，万道后土有任何联系。

desc_EN: Found in all caves, Praesidio is the tutelary deity that inhabits countless locations and takes millions of forms. The Ring Liberation Front, who swore to take back the asteroid belt, was unwavering in their belief.
desc_CHS: 寄宿于不同龙脉，龙守作为分身千百的土地神，对发愿夺回小行星带的星环自由战线，是无庸置疑的神明。
shop_desc_EN: A common ceremonial item among the people of Thousand Peaks. Its price on the market mostly depends on the craftsmanship.
shop_desc_CHS:
群山民间常见的祭祀工艺品
依据工艺品等级，在市场有不同流通价格

desc_EN: A broken starsong synthescepter. The shattered lumen crystal reed used for resonance in the front was still pretty valuable on the market.
desc_CHS: 坏掉的龙鸣仿声器，由于前端有着碎裂的汜晶体用作共振的簧片，可以在市场换到不错的价格。
shop_desc_EN: Due to the rise of the post-war scavenging industry, this is a common find in the ruins.
shop_desc_CHS: 龙脉冲突后由于拾荒业兴起，废墟中挖掘的交易品随手可见。

desc_EN:
"For the shared prosperity of United Mining and the Rumani Clan."

A dagger was hidden in the contract supposedly written for a transfer of rights to a cave. This plan led to the demise of the once powerful Rumani Clan.
desc_CHS:
「愿吉普赛与矿业联合共存共荣」

隐藏式的匕首被卷在龙脉矿场的交接合约中，是这行动导致了吉普赛家族的灭亡。
shop_desc_EN: In the Peaker markets, you can find a buyer for anything if you have the right contact.

desc_EN:
On the back of the photo were a few words to the doctor, written by Red:

"The flowers have bloomed... so hang this over your operating table, will you? For my friend Dr. Rushell, I miss our days of flight."
desc_CHS:
照片背面只有几句话，
是艾妲师父留给罗素的。

花开了，你就把照片钉在你的手术台吧。
给罗素吾友，怀念可以飞的日子。

desc_EN: Countless runners have something like this hanging on them at all times. They pray to the guardians of asteroids, Praesidio, imploring these earth gods to open a path for them so that they may find a cave of riches.
desc_CHS: 不少龙脉探勘人身上都会有类似的吊饰，他们祈求小行星之神「龙守」为他们开路，找到丰沛的矿脉。
shop_desc_EN: A common ceremonial item among the people of Thousand Peaks. Its price on the market mostly depends on the craftsmanship.
shop_desc_CHS:
群山民间常见的祭祀工艺品
依据工艺品等级，在市场有不同流通价格

desc_EN:
On the back were the words:
May Ignis shed light upon your good deeds.

To thank Ignis for the light he provides, Peakers used this to offer up prayers in their homes. Since it looks like a lumen relic, it's commonly used to trick outsiders searching for valuable artifacts, but it's really not worth much.
desc_CHS:
背后写着
「愿烛龙光照，今日众善奉行。」
...
为了感念烛龙赐予的阳光，群山民间会于家中摆设祈福。
由于貌似龙脉的文物，常被用来诈骗外地的文物搜集商，本身没有太多价值。
shop_desc_EN: A common ceremonial item among the people of Thousand Peaks. Its price on the market mostly depends on the craftsmanship.
shop_desc_CHS:
群山民间常见的祭祀工艺品
依据工艺品等级，在市场有不同流通价格

desc_EN:
"Neverlasting paths, what comes may not be what you ask, and what you ask may not come to pass."

Carved on the base of this ancient disc were prayers addressed to the Myrian god of space and time, Binarii. Some people believe there are two Binarii gates in Thousand Peaks which pass through space and time. When one enters the gates, it is said they will see whatever they desire. Some scavengers would also hang these in their ships, praying to find valuable debris, or a way home when they got lost in space.
desc_CHS:
二向无常，遇而无往，无往而遇。
...
俊刻在圆盘上，是万道的时空神「二向」的祈福语，传说它们镇守时空之门，只要穿过，便能见到想要的人事物，有些拾荒船会挂上这引魂盘，祈祷二向能带领他们遇到好的残骸，或是迷路时可以回家。
shop_desc_EN: A common ceremonial item among the people of Thousand Peaks. Its price on the market mostly depends on the craftsmanship.

desc_EN:
A tiny little rocket. Emeth said that on his journey, a young man and woman had given it to him. On the bottom were a few words:

Heavenly Earth, thanks to all the players for your continued support.

SIGONO Manufacturing
desc_CHS:
那是一枚小小的火箭，艾姆说是旅途中，一对男女送给他的。
下面只有几行字。

地球在上，
谢谢所有玩家一直以来的支持。

SIGONO 联合工厂出品
shop_desc_EN: In the Peaker markets, you can find a buyer for anything if you have the right contact.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山的市场上，只要有门道，几乎什么东西都能找到收购者。

desc_EN:
"I've never been able to find the little princess, and the clan's royal bloodline stops with her. If you ever come across her, please give this to her for me. Tell her that even though her mother is known as a traitor, she will always love you. Your name is... Miranda Mers."

A hair adornment given to us by Shiyaa that was proof of Rumani royalty.
desc_CHS:
我这辈子都找不到小公主了，我们族的血脉从此断绝...好心的船队，如果你们遇到她，请帮我把这给她。

告诉她，她妈妈尽管被当成为叛徒，但她永远爱你，你的名字是「米兰达・默斯」

席雅留给我们的发饰，那是吉普赛王族的证明。
shop_desc_EN: In the Peaker markets, you can find a buyer for anything if you have the right contact.

desc_EN: Inscriptions used by the Myrians for musical resonance. The little fragments of lumenite within made them a popular item for trade among the people.
desc_CHS: 万道用于跟音乐共振的谱面，由于里面有着细碎的汜晶体，成为民间交易的常见标的。
shop_desc_EN: A common relic found in Myrian shrines. It can be sold at a decent price.
shop_desc_CHS: 万道神殿深处常见古文物，可以于市场换到不错的价格。

desc_EN:
A rare East Ocean epic that was hard to come by, even in the homeland.

The myth recounts how a flash of light beamed down from a distant star, striking East Ocean's sun, Taiyang, which was dim and without radiance. From that point forth, the great star emitted an ice-blue lumen light. 

Taiyang then descended from the heavens and created the East Ocean Empire, marking the beginning of East Ocean mythology.
desc_CHS:
连瀛海都很难找到的古神话诗歌。

诗歌的内容描述，古代从遥远银河爆发的的一瞬闪光，经过亿年旅行后，击中了黯淡的主星太乙，从此太乙放出了冰蓝的汜气光芒，点亮了史诗神话。

自此古神「太乙」降世，于瀛海建国，是为瀛海龙脉神话之始。

desc_EN:
Plum Shalaa

8512 war orphan. Adopted by the Witching Tower and served as a witch during the Lumen War. After the Witching Tower was disbanded, worked as a diviner and music teacher.

- Divorced w/ 1 son
- Lumen War Relief Foundation Lv. 1 Disability
- Requires assistance walking
desc_CHS:
MEI（莎拉・梅）
银河历 8512 年战后孤儿，由巫塔收养，成为女巫，于首次龙脉冲突时退役，巫塔遣散后曾任占卜师，音乐教师。

离婚、育有一子
持有龙脉遗族抚恤会一级伤残证
行走不便需辅具

desc_EN: When we first found this, Remi smiled, something she rarely did. This was the Galactic Empire's fastest micro-engine system. Even though Red Chamber was an old ship, equipping this engine would make it one of the fastest small vessels in Thousand Peaks.
desc_CHS:
刚找到它时，菈米亚少见的笑了出来。
那是统合体最快的小型引擎系统。即使是红楼这样的老船，如果成功安装，也会名列群山地区最快的小型舰艇。
因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.
因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.

desc_EN:
Character Design Draft
Terra: Played by former witch, Sonya
Helius: Vacancy
Ten Peaks: Casting call
Servum: God not yet able to sing (Undecided)
Sanctum: God who can sing (Yusef)

A manuscript left by Rodin, the famous writer. While searching for inspiration, he didn't hesitate to enter caves to look for source material.
desc_CHS:
角色设计草案
后土：由前女巫，森宁担任
乙皇：（演员从缺）
十山：（需要演员征选）
卒：尚未取得歌法的神明（未定）
道：能行歌的神明（尤斯出演）
...
著名的作家-罗登遗落的手稿，为了创作，他不惜冒险进入龙脉取材。
shop_desc_EN: The intel markets are happy to purchase all sorts of documents. What looks like useless information might one day reveal some hidden treasures.

desc_EN: The blade-shaped crystal stamen made this a popular ceremonial import, used to pray for victory in battle. Even with the lack of floral life caused by overdevelopment, you could still see these in the halls of East Ocean.
desc_CHS: 由于花蕊的结晶似刀，常有人进口苏禾用于祭典，祈祷武运昌隆，甚至连开发过度、少有花卉的瀛海也能看到苏禾列于厅堂。
shop_desc_EN: In Thousand Peaks, lumen plants are commonly traded items that have a wide range of medical and biochemical uses.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山，龙脉花卉通常是拿来交易的大宗商品，被广泛应用在医疗与生化方面。

name_EN: Principles of the Ring Liberation Front 8531 Edition
desc_EN:
"Endless lumen, light the way,
that the belt may rise again one day."

These principles guided the Ring Liberation Front's guerilla squad, a group of warriors who opposed United Mining. After the Lumen War, many of them became mercenaries or pirates.
desc_CHS:
龙脉常在，风水引路，小行星必将奋起
...
那是星环自由战线的游击队守则，他们是一群反对矿业联合的战士，龙脉冲突后，多数人成为雇佣军，甚至黑帮。

desc_EN:
Eda's knowledge of lumen plants far surpassed my imagination. Once she even asked me to take the eco-scanner and test her. It could identify hundreds of plants, but she'd just say:

"That's basic witch knowledge."
desc_CHS:
艾妲对于龙脉植物的认知远超乎我想像，曾经叫我拿着扫描器考她，尽管这能鉴定百种植物，但她只会微笑说：

「这只是女巫的基本。」

desc_EN: Most Peaker ships, including Red Chamber, didn't have the credits to spend on defense. Reactive armor that was easy to disassemble was a common choice for civilians.
desc_CHS: 包括红楼在内的群山民间船，多半没有预算用在船舰的防护上，简单快拆的反应装甲成了人们常见的选择。
shop_desc_EN:
United Mining SRA-12 Specifications

Reactive armor plates that self-destruct when hit to prevent damage. All models available. Select the model that's right for you.

[Please replace after use]
Easy to disassemble and replace. Can be installed by qualified technicians.
shop_desc_CHS:
矿联SRA-12通用规格。
多种品项，请自行选购适合款式。
模块化反应装甲，敌火来袭时自动爆破，抵销伤害。
[使用后须更换新品。 ]
拆装容易，替换方便，可以由合格技师安装船体外侧上。

desc_EN:
"Whenever the wind blows, the tiny bits of lumenite in the stamen crack and flitter away as the rest of the flower wilts."

Given that it's used as a farewell flower, the demand for it on the market is rather large. That's how Eda explained it to me.
desc_CHS:
「这种花风吹过时，花蕊中的微小汜晶体会碎裂飘落，然后就会凋零。」

因为多半被用作送别的花，在市场上需求不少，艾妲是如此解释此花。
shop_desc_EN: In Thousand Peaks, lumen plants are commonly traded items that have a wide range of medical and biochemical uses.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山，龙脉花卉通常是拿来交易的大宗商品，被广泛应用在医疗与生化方面。

desc_EN:
By the light of Ignis, Myria everlasting.

A fair trader, and an honest neighbor.

VIP ID 03212
desc_CHS:
烛龙在上，万道日常
公平公正的做生意，童叟无欺的好邻居
VIP ID 03212

desc_EN: Starsongs... rumbles from the depths of asteroids. By analyzing them, one could glean the coordinates of lumen asteroids, making them highly coveted items in the marketplace. However, only the emissaries of Myrian gods, the witches, could record them.
desc_CHS: 龙脉深处的轰鸣，可以从中解析出龙脉的座标，成为市场上炙手可热的商品，但只有万道诸神的使者，女巫可以录制。

desc_EN: When Eda said, "That's a good thing." I couldn't tell if she actually meant it...
desc_CHS: 该怎么说呢，当艾妲说幸好的时候，我不知道她是开心还难过。

desc_EN: Unlike Eda's voice, the starsong that came through the ground was deep and resounding, while the vibration of liquid that traveled into my hand felt ancient and full of sorrow. However, the sound quality was somewhat choppy...
desc_CHS: 与艾妲的声音不同，地脉的龙鸣低沉而悠远，水体的震动传到我手中，古老又哀伤，但声音却断断续续…

desc_EN: Kay reprimanded me for this endlessly. He would remind me that I had no idea how to keep things low-profile and that I was always screwing things up with my impulsive decisions. "Not the qualities of a leader," he would say.
desc_CHS: 大魁因为这件事训诫我数回，说我永远不懂低调处理，冲动害事，愧为少主。

name_EN: Lumen Cave 06: Red Chamber Perfect Starsong
desc_EN: Banshee was different from the other shrines. This place wasn't built for transmutation. All that we found was an atmosphere of death and decay. This was where Myria came to an end.
desc_CHS: 黑龙跟以往所有的神殿都不同，这里不是兴建来风水引流，有的只有结束与死亡的气息，是万道的最终。

desc_EN: The hard lumenite ore found in the depths of caves vary so much in purity and the sound frequencies it produces that it's difficult to use as industrial fuel. Instead, since lumen is worshipped by the people, it tends to be used for artistic or ceremonial purposes.
desc_CHS: 龙脉深处剥落的硬质汜矿，由于纯度与对声音频率不一，难以用作工业燃料，却因为民间对龙脉的崇拜，常被加工为各种工艺，或祭祀用品。
shop_desc_EN: A lumen crystal found in the depths of caves that lies somewhere between a mineral and an artifact. Depending on its purity, it can be pretty valuable in the markets.
shop_desc_CHS:
龙脉深处的汜晶体，介于文物与矿物之间
依据纯度，在市场有不同流通价格。

desc_EN: Audio from lumenide that was almost completely dried up. Even in the analysis the quality had disintegrated so much that it was hard to make out.
desc_CHS: 解析几乎干涸的汜水波动后的声音，音质碎裂而难以辨认。

desc_EN: The resonance of the liquid called forth subtle whimpers. It was so gloomy that you couldn't help but feel a bit uneasy.
desc_CHS: 水的共振唤起一段细微的呜咽声，幽暗让人不安。

desc_EN:
A communication device hidden beneath Eda's hair, which also has the ability to adjust one's timbre. It was used to assist soldiers with injured throats.

Afterward, I found out that Bones hadn't confiscated it partially out of sympathy and partially because of his confidence that no one would encroach on his territory.
desc_CHS:
装在艾妲身上的隐藏发信装置，也具备调节声线的功能，是喉咙伤残的士兵会使用的辅具。

后来才知道，白牙没搜走艾妲的装置，有一半是因为同情，一半是没人敢动他地盘的自信。

desc_EN: In Myrian mythology, Helius was the remaining star stuff left over from Ignis' fiery creation of the world. Having inherited some of Ignis' power, he is second only to Ignis, the god of gods.
desc_CHS: 万道神话中，「乙皇」是太阳神烛龙烈焰创世后，余留的一团星火，是仅次烛龙的最高神。

desc_EN: After space burials were banned in Thousand Peaks, if you wanted to send something to an outer planetary system, you not only needed a permit, but also a precision launcher... Getting to East Ocean was even more difficult, given that it was tens of thousands of light-years away.
desc_CHS: 在宇宙葬被禁止的群山，如果要将小型物体送回外星系，除了要有官方许可外，更需要精确的轨道发射装置...更别提几万光年远的瀛海。

desc_EN: Even though I was anxious to finish exploring before United Mining got here, I couldn't stop wondering when it was that Remi started hating me.
desc_CHS: 虽然那时很急着在矿联来前完成探索，但我却一直想着，菈米亚是什么时候开始讨厌我。

desc_EN: Could Eda's master really be in the depths of some shrine...? No matter how I thought about it, I wasn't very optimistic.
desc_CHS: 艾妲的师父会在神殿的深处吗···我怎么想都不乐观。

desc_EN: Afterward, Remi told me that she never thought she'd have to use this.
desc_CHS: 菈米亚后来跟我说，她从来没想到会有使用的一天。

desc_EN: This sent shivers down my spine... Could this really be where Eda's master went missing?
desc_CHS: 龙鸣声让人不快...这里会是艾妲师父失踪的地方吗...

desc_EN:
A carving of the black hole deity Excidium. As god of the netherworld, he is the only Myrian god whose prayers may not be uttered in the main hall of the shrines.

Myrian religion believes that when people die they return to Ignis. However, evildoers return to the black hole Excidium, a barren wasteland where no light can be found, abandoned by the gods.
desc_CHS:
神像上雕刻的是黑洞之神「大荒」，是万道唯一无法于主殿祭拜的阴间神。

万道相信人死后会回归烛龙，但如果坏事做尽，死后就会回到黑洞大荒，那是被众神遗弃，无光的荒凉之境。

desc_EN: Lumen plants are primarily used for medical purposes, most commonly in emergency military situations. A few even have the ability to repair cellular damage. It's no wonder that in Myrian mythology there are countless stories of the pursuit for immortal life.
desc_CHS: 龙脉植物多半用于医疗，被广泛运用在军事急救，极少数还具备细胞的修复力，难怪万道的神话中，总是有许多追求不老不死的故事流传。

desc_EN:
A very unique variety of lumen irix that has seven buds. However, when it blossoms, only one will open and the other six will wither.

As she assessed the flower, Eda mentioned that East Ocean scholars believed this plant had a negative energy, and represented turmoil.
desc_CHS:
龙脉鸢尾的一种特化种，具有七株花苞，然而每次开花时却只有一株会绽放，其他六株则会枯萎。

「你们瀛海的龙脉学者常说这种花具有邪性，暗示着动乱。」艾妲对花如此评价。
shop_desc_EN: In Thousand Peaks, lumen plants are commonly traded items that have a wide range of medical and biochemical uses.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山，龙脉花卉通常是拿来交易的大宗商品，被广泛应用在医疗与生化方面。

desc_EN:
A common lumen plant hidden within the depths of caves, it's used to increase blood circulation. Still, I'm not sure why it's so expensive.

"Look it up yourself." Eda seemed reluctant to explain why.
desc_CHS:
隐藏在龙脉深处的常见植物，可以促进血液循环，不知为何拥有过高的售价。

「自己找数据。」记得艾妲不太想说明。
shop_desc_EN: In Thousand Peaks, lumen plants are commonly traded items that have a wide range of medical and biochemical uses.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山，龙脉花卉通常是拿来交易的大宗商品，被广泛应用在医疗与生化方面。

desc_EN: If a cave was improperly handled during excavation, the lumen would gradually dry up, causing the leaves of lumen plants to form crystals that were often used for religious purposes.
desc_CHS: 如果矿脉遭受盗采，汜水逐渐干涸的情况，会导致植物的叶脉结晶，形成的特殊晶体常被作为宗教用途。
shop_desc_EN: Even when a lumen plant hasn't grown very well, due to their medicinal qualities, they're always worth something in the markets.
shop_desc_CHS: 尽管生长状况不佳，龙脉花卉因为其作为药材的特性，在市场上始终有着良好的流通性

desc_EN:
4 Orbis, 7 Circum, 6 Gradus
Praesidio Illustrates Thus

This mural depicts how Helius hoped to use the lumen from across the galaxy to fuel his empire. The center mural of Ignis represented Thousand Peaks, while the countless specks surrounding it represented lumen caves. Through two special gates, the caves would arrive at Thousand Peaks, and fly towards Ignis.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守制图于
四轮七天六地

图描述的，是乙皇希望将银河间的龙脉归己所有的帝国愿景。

中央烛龙的雕刻象征群山，周遭无数的星点则是龙脉，它们透过两个特殊的门往来群山，飞向烛龙。

desc_EN:
It was believed that the consciousness of Terra inhabited witch's rose. However, the lack of evidence led to the theory being dismissed. 

"Any plant that grows in a lumen cave, may be connected to Terra's consciousness," Eda said. After all, in Myrian mythology, it was from Terra's song that life blossomed.
desc_CHS:
巫香曾被认为蕴藏神明后土的意识，却因为找不出证据而放弃。

「只要是龙脉中生长的植物，都可能与后土的意识有所关连。」艾妲这么说，毕竟神话中，生命是因为它的歌而绽放。
shop_desc_EN: In Thousand Peaks, lumen plants are commonly traded items that have a wide range of medical and biochemical uses.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山，龙脉花卉通常是拿来交易的大宗商品，被广泛应用在医疗与生化方面。

desc_EN: Space junk commonly seen floating throughout abandoned ruins after the war. It was dangerous to transport, but given its range of uses, it was a very popular item among scavengers.
desc_CHS: 龙脉冲突后，废弃残骸区常见的宇宙垃圾。尽管运送危险，但因为其实用性，依然是炙手可热的拾荒品。
shop_desc_EN: Due to the rise of the post-war scavenging industry, this is a common find in the ruins.
shop_desc_CHS: 龙脉冲突后由于拾荒业兴起，废墟中挖掘的交易品随手可见。

desc_EN:
At the end of the story, Helius slays the gods who killed Terra. He tried to resurrect her with lumen flowers, but Ignis, whose people were slain, furiously warned him that if Terra were resurrected, the fires of heaven would destroy Thousand Peaks. Helius disobeyed, hiding his lover's corpse in Excidium. His last words before sending his lover into the void were: "When the flowers bloom, we shall meet in the next life."

The heavens erupted and Helius was blown away by wind storms, scattered among the stars.
desc_CHS:
故事最后，乙皇成功消灭了杀害后土的诸神，并试图用龙脉生长的花卉让后土复活，然而子民被杀，愤怒的烛龙却警告乙皇，若复活后土，会将群山用天火燃尽，乙皇不允，反将爱人的尸首藏于大荒，送离群山，他留下最后的话语，目送后土于虚空离去。

「花开有时，来世再遇。」

此后天火爆发，乙皇被风暴吹飞，从此消散于群星间。

desc_EN:
Binarii is two gods whose head and tail are adjoined, never to meet, representing the neverending flow of space-time. Legend has it that the gates of Binarii reach beyond time and space, and those who pass through may be met with anyone from anywhere.

Travelling Peakers would often utter the prayers of Binarii to each other before setting off on long journeys.
desc_CHS:
两个方向的神明首尾相连，永不交会，代表永不止息的时空流转，传说只要通过二向镇守的大门，就能超越时间与空间，与不同的人事物相遇。

在群山的旅人间，旅人由于离别无常，常引用二向的话语作为祈福。

desc_EN:
The guardians of lumen asteroids. Carvings of these deities could be found on lumen valves. It's believed Praesidio is split into hundreds of forms, present wherever lumen can be found.

Besides protecting lumen, they are responsible for recording history, and their accounts could be seen all over Myrian inscriptions.
desc_CHS:
守护龙脉的小行星之神，它们的雕刻镶嵌在各种汜水的阀门，分身上百，只要有龙脉，便无所不在。

它们守护土地时也负责纪录该地的历史，万道碑文中，往往能见到它们的记述。

name_EN: Scripture: Splitting of the Ten Peaks (Part 1)
desc_EN:
Authored by the Lumen Association, based on archaeological data from Myrian ruins.

This text describes the late stages of the Myrian Empire, when Helius called upon Terra to sing for Myria's continued prosperity. Ignis was enraged by this, and he warned the gods that the wrath of heaven would befall them if they did not stop. Helius defied Ignis, however, and was dragged into war with the gods who took Ignis' side...
desc_CHS:
龙脉协会所著，内容多半来自于龙脉遗迹的考古数据。

描述乙皇面对万道帝国晚期，为延万道国祚，令后土行歌引导龙脉，此举触怒了烛龙，它警告诸神，若不停止，将会有天罚降临，然而乙皇无视烛龙，与支持烛龙的神明陷入战争...
shop_desc_EN:
An accessible translation of the classic text "Splitting of the Ten Peaks", with over 300 hand-drawn illustrations to bring you into the world of Myria.

This version is a cooperation between the Lumen Association and Aurora Civil College, created to give readers a more visual sense of the text. With its small size, it's perfect for reading at home or taking it on the go.
shop_desc_CHS:
最浅白易读的天地开辟经新译本，近三百幅彩色手绘插图，带你进入万道的世界。
本版特色：
龙脉协会与朝山公民大学学者联合著作
附精美手绘插图，让读经更具立体画面感。
适中尺寸大小，不论在家阅读或外出聚会皆适宜。

desc_EN: Lumen intel given to us by what looked like a friendly capybara. Could I really trust this?
desc_CHS: 一个有点面善的水豚送我们的情报，这真的可靠吗？

desc_EN:
The sun of every planetary system has its own unique starsong.

At the time of our exile, Kay searched among the different stars and asked me to choose where we would go. The equipment used to record the starsong from Thousand Peaks was old, and the sound quality wasn't good, so I don't know why I cried the first time I heard it. That strong sense of longing was why I chose it as our destination.
desc_CHS:
不同行星系的太阳，都有自己的龙鸣声。

当年为了找出逃亡的目的地，大魁搜集了不同太阳请我挑选，群山的录音因为设备老旧，声质不好，听到时我却不明所以的流泪，那股强烈的怀念，成为我来到群山的原因。

desc_EN:
"Let their souls shine among the stars, so that we may raise the flag of United Mining in this barren land."

A popular history series from several decades ago. It described the heroes of United Mining and how, over the course of several years, they colonized several planetary systems, squashing lumium-related superstitions for the glory of their god.
desc_CHS:
「愿灵魂闪耀于淬铁的星火之间，
让蛮荒间升起矿联的旗帜。 」

矿联十多年前流行过的历史影集，描述矿业联合的英雄，如何拓荒行星系，剿灭汜气有关的灵魂迷信，并荣耀他们的神。
shop_desc_EN: In the Peaker markets, you can find a buyer for anything if you have the right contact.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山的市场上，只要有门道，几乎什么东西都能找到收购者。

desc_EN:
4 Orbis, 1 Circum, 2 Gradus
Praesidio Composes Thus

Terra's Song Shrine is complete,
the gates to Binarii space-time are open.
My song shall guide lumen from afar,
Entering the Binarii gates to Ignis,
So that he may ingest it,
and thereby creating more in abundance. 
I shall channel his flames with my songs,
asking only by the blessings of Helius,
that Myria may reign eternal.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守谱于
四轮一天二地

后土歌殿已成，二向门开，
吾将行歌，引河外龙脉，
穿二向，入烛龙之口，
愿烛龙食之，龙脉丰之。

吾将以歌驭烛龙之炎，
只求乙皇赐福，万道常在。

desc_EN: Archaeological research indicates that when the Myrian gods' cultivation proved ineffective, they relied on song pipes to enhance their voices. Only then were they able to enter the gates. This unique feature made it much easier for modern cave runners to open them.
desc_CHS: 考古的研究指出，万道的神明如果修为不足时，必须倚靠龙鸣箱强化歌声，才能进出龙门，这一特性大大降低了现代龙脉探勘的难度。

desc_EN:
"While gathering material, I have discovered a most peculiar thing. The Witching Tower records indicate that, every few decades, a witch whose powers are suddenly cut short will appear. Six peculiar marks will appear on her throat and she will slowly lose her ability to sing. What fascinating material..."

A manuscript left by Rodin, the famous writer. While searching for inspiration, he didn't hesitate to enter caves to look for source material.
desc_CHS:
取材日记节录
取材过程中，我发现奇怪的现象，巫塔记载中，群山数十年就会有一位女巫突然无法唱歌，她喉咙会浮现六个点的奇妙胎记，之后就会慢慢丧失唱歌的能力，这会是个好题材...
...
著名的作家-罗登遗落的手稿，为了创作，他不惜冒险进入龙脉取材。
shop_desc_EN: The intel markets are happy to purchase all sorts of documents. What looks like useless information might one day reveal some hidden treasures.

desc_EN: Within the Myrian shrines, to separate the lower and higher deities, only the gods that could chant the inscriptions on the massive gates were allowed to come and go.
desc_CHS: 万道神殿中，为诸神分级的大门，唯有能正确唱诵龙门谱面的神明，才有在神殿中来去的权利。

desc_EN: Even as secondhand parts taken off wartime military vessels, the products sold in United Mining shops were always of the highest quality. So much so, that Remi would occasionally shop for these behind Eda's back.
desc_CHS: 仅管是从龙脉冲突退役的军船，拆解出来的二手货，但矿连商店销售的品质仍然优良，菈米亚甚至背着艾妲逛了好一阵子。
shop_desc_EN:
United Mining Certified Secondhand Product
Supplies are limited.

Military-grade electrical components by United Mining. Durable against electromagnetic pulse attacks. 

[Designed according to Phase II of the Lumen Mining Act Clarification Proceedings]
[Dismantled from a retired military vessel]
shop_desc_CHS:
[矿联认证中古货]
数量有限，售完不补

行星矿业联合制造
军规电子元件，可防范电磁脉冲攻击

[本零件依据龙脉指定法二期精简计划]
[由退役的军船拆卸]

desc_EN: An advanced sensor taken off a retired military vessel. Given that we were buying military technology from the same United Mining that had taken her master away, Eda had mixed feelings about the purchase.
desc_CHS: 那是从退役军船拆下的高阶感应元件。购买时，艾妲的心情其实很复杂，毕竟是跟带走她师父的矿联购买军备。
shop_desc_EN:
United Mining Certified Antique
Supplies are limited.

Smart sensors that provide precision measurements for pressure, humidity, electromagnets, and more. 16 sets of customizable, military specification sensors.

[Designed according to Phase II of the Lumen Mining Act Clarification Proceedings]
[Dismantled from a retired military vessel]
shop_desc_CHS:
[矿联认证中古货]
数量有限，售完不补

行星矿业联合制造
智能感应，精确测量压力、温湿、电磁...
十六组军规可客制感应元件

[本零件依据龙脉指定法二期精简计划]
[由退役的军船拆卸]

desc_CHS: 格纳库初始数据，游戏不显示

desc_EN: Produced by the Rumani Clan, who placed a very high value on diplomatic relations. Most of these were used on their unique, high-speed vessels. After they were defeated, their technology was taken by United Mining, and the defective units were sold on the market for a high price.
desc_CHS: 由重视外交的吉普赛家族所制造，多半用于他们特殊的高速飞艇，吉普赛败退后，技术由矿联吸收，而废弃的瑕疵品则被转到市场高价出售。
shop_desc_EN:
United Mining Certified Antique
Supplies are limited.

Highly treated lumen plates with a lumen alloy density of 5.73%. Multi-layered composite armor that's easy to dismantle and install.

[Designed according to Phase II of the Lumen Mining Act Clarification Proceedings]
[Salvaged from Rumani Clan airspace]
shop_desc_CHS:
[矿联认证中古货]
数量有限，售完不补

特级汜金属加工，汜合金密度 5.73%
高级多层次复合装甲，易于拆卸安装

[本零件依据龙脉指定法二期精简计划]
[由吉普赛家族的残骸空域打捞]

desc_EN: A lumen metal plate created by fusing a small amount of lumium into steel. Its ability to block off lumium induced hallucinations made it a commonly seen material around the caves.
desc_CHS: 将少量汜气加入钢材制成的汜金属，由于可以阻隔汜气产生的幻觉，在龙脉矿场常见这些临时压铸的板材。
shop_desc_EN:
Lumen Association Recycled (Like New)

Salvaged from a Lumen Association cave.

With a lumen alloy density of 0.34%, it can be used to enhance armor and is perfect for cave exploration modifications.
shop_desc_CHS:
龙脉协会回收品：九成新未整理
本品项由龙脉矿场回收

汜合金密度 0.34%
可用于强化装甲，探索龙脉必备改造零件

desc_EN: After the war, the airspace in Thousand Peaks was full of unidentifiable electromagnetic waves, sent out by communication modules scattered throughout space, making space travel full of unpredictable risks.
desc_CHS: 龙脉冲突后，因为这些散落的模组发出的讯号，让群山的空域充满无法辨识的电磁波，航行变得异常危险。

desc_EN:
"Now the flowers will definitely grow a bit better..."

I still remember Eda smiling when she saw the environmental control system. If I remember correctly, it could simulate the environment needed for lumen plants to grow. Given that Red Chamber had a greenhouse, it was a crucial piece of equipment.
desc_CHS:
「这样花又可以长得更好些呢...」
我还记得艾妲看到环控系统的微笑，这似乎可用来模拟龙脉花卉的生长环境，对具备温室的红楼，是不可多得的重要配件。
shop_desc_EN:
Lumen Association Recycled (Like New)

Salvaged from battleground airspace debris. Please consult with a technician before purchasing.

[Manufacturer: Zhao Ghe Resources]
Just what you need to keep lumen plants alive. Nearly 100 simulation settings. Precision control of humidity, lumium flow rate, temperature and more.
shop_desc_CHS:
龙脉协会回收品：九成新未整理
本品项打捞自龙脉冲突残骸空域
购买前请与技术人员确认

[朝歌汜气能源集团制造]
活体龙脉植物保存必备
近百组模拟条件
可精确控制、湿度、汜气流量等环境因素

desc_EN:
A reactor produced by United Mining that could very effectively transform lumen into usable energy.

After the war, they became popular among scavengers, sometimes even leading to conflicts over territory.
desc_CHS:
矿业联合自产的反应炉，能以高效率进行汜的能源转换。

龙脉冲突后成为拾荒人的抢手货，甚至有因为它而发生的地盘冲突。
shop_desc_EN:
Dismantled from a United Mining Sentry Station

Suitable for United Mining vessels. Can be installed on hybrid lumium engines.

[Reprocessed by Shiratsuka Parts]
[We hope this part was destined for you]
shop_desc_CHS:
矿业联合哨站拆解品
适合矿联船系
可安装于混合汜气动力引擎

[本品项为白冢零件打捞重制品]
[愿零件与你有美好的相遇]

desc_EN: After the war, abandoned ship parts leftover from the battles became an important resource for revitalizing Thousand Peaks. On some of the parts, you could even see the Ring Liberation Front's production label.
desc_CHS: 龙脉冲突后，战场遗留了大量的废弃船零件，成为群山人复兴的重要资产，某些零件上，甚至看得到星环自由战线的出品的标签。
shop_desc_EN:
[Trash Mountain Recycled Product] 
Manufactured by the R.L.F. in 8515

Never fear getting snatched by United Mining again! Anti-rust and anti-rot treatments make it easy to keep clean. Please check for a Trash Mountain seal of authenticity before purchasing.
shop_desc_CHS:
[垃圾山回收二手品] 
本品项由星环自由战线于8515年制造

让你飞船再也不用畏惧矿联的追捕
防锈防腐，不易脏污
购买前请确认垃圾山雷雕认证

desc_EN: Lumen alloys would not only enhance a ship's armor, they could also be used for storing lumium. You would see massive cylinders made of these lumen plates at the more technologically advanced caves.
desc_CHS: 汜的合金不仅可以提升装甲强度，也能作为装载汜气的容器，只要是高级的龙脉矿场，常能看到汜金属板拼装的大型汽缸。
因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.

desc_EN:
Thousand Peaks Civil College often sent out expedition parties, and their notes could occasionally be found within the caves.

"Summary of the 4th Research Expedition:
Those with abnormal concentrations of lumen in their blood can sense the vibrations of lumen. Since these vibrations may come from a different space-time, the lumen may contain emotional frequencies from those continuums. As a result, those extra sensitive to lumen may experience a variety of emotions. This phenomenon is known as 'resonance', though some refer to it as 'hearing the voice of spirits'."
desc_CHS:
群山公民大学常送出探险队，龙脉中不时会找到遗落的笔记
...
第四次研究团探险摘要
血液中拥有异常浓度汜的人，能够感应汜的震动，由于汜的震动不一定来自于同个时空，可能是某个时空片段中，具有感情的频率，因此感受到震动的人，也会感受到不同的情绪。
这种现象，被称为「龙脉共振」，也有人称为「听到灵魂的声音」
shop_desc_EN: The intel markets are happy to purchase all sorts of documents. What looks like useless information might one day reveal some hidden treasures.

desc_CHS: 油量值初始数据，游戏不显示

desc_EN:
8 Orbis, 1 Circum, 12 Gradus
Praesidio Records the Great Works of Terra

1 Orbis: Helius blesses Terra
2 Orbis: Terra preaches song, and the Servums become Sanctums
3 Orbis: Terra sings to the Sanctums, extending their life.
......

This chronology memorializes Terra, how she channeled the lumen, and sang for the gods.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守谱后土伟业于
八轮一天二十地

ㄧ轮：乙皇封后土
二轮：后土授歌，众卒成道
三轮：后土为众道行歌，诸神续命
…
年表似乎是纪念亡故的后土，内容是它如何引导龙脉，行歌的纪录。

desc_EN:
Osman was a famous black hole scholar who spent his whole life trying to debunk the myths of Myria for the glory of United Mining. 

"Worship of the black hole Excidium and its status as a deity appeared late in Myrian history. This so-called 'god', from my perspective, arose out of some taboo surrounding the black hole. In order to ensure that people did not approach it, Excidium was created..."
desc_CHS:
奥斯曼是矿联有名的黑洞学者，一生努力破解万道的迷信，荣耀矿联。
...
黑洞「大荒」这天体信仰，作为诸神在万道历史中出现得很晚。

这些群山人以为自己信仰了神明，在我看来，绝对是古代黑洞附近有什么禁忌，不想让人靠近才会为大荒立神...
shop_desc_EN: The intel markets are happy to purchase all sorts of documents. What looks like useless information might one day reveal some hidden treasures.

desc_EN: Even though Eda said that her throat was damaged and she couldn't sing well, her voice rang out like the sorrows of heaven, almost as if she experienced the pain herself.
desc_CHS: 虽然艾妲说自己喉咙受伤，唱歌不好听，但却仿佛唱出了神明的哀愁，宛如自己亲身经验的痛苦。
共振仪初始数据，游戏不显示

desc_EN:
Excerpts from this conference indicate that the Myrian gods who existed in ancient times may have been higher dimensional conscious beings that were formed by a mixture of lumen and other minerals. It is surmised that they used some form of song to activate their internal lumen in order to survive.

Without song, they would most likely turn back into their mineral form, and their consciousness would return to the flow of lumen, dispersed among the void.
desc_CHS:
研讨会指出，古代银河中的万道诸神，可能是汜与矿物混合后，产生的高维意识体，并用「歌」，让体内的汜活化，进而生存。

反之无歌的情况，它们可能就会变回矿物，曾有的意识则会回归汜的流动，消散于虚空。

desc_EN: Sometimes I thought that even if Eda never joined the Lumen Association, no matter how many times the doctor yelled at her, she'd still help out Eda out whenever she needed it.
desc_CHS: 我觉得，就算一辈子不加入龙脉协会，医生也会边骂着艾妲，边提供她各种协助。

desc_EN: Eda's voice aid was old, but she never even considered getting a new one. One time I asked her why, and she said it was because the most important person in her life gave it to her.
desc_CHS: 尽管辅具已经老旧，但艾妲没有想更换的想法，当时我问过为什么，她只回我，这是很重要的人送她的。
因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.

desc_EN:
The doctor gave this to us before we left Aurora. On the ring was a carving of the six planets that had disappeared long ago. They symbolized the Six Peaks that revolted against Helius during the holy war.

This ring was used by those in the Lumen Association carrying out secret orders.
desc_CHS:
离开朝山前，医生交付的信物，戒指的雕刻是消失的六大行星，象征着古代战争时，与乙皇发动叛乱的六山诸神。

那是龙脉协会用于交换密令的戒指。
因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.
因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.

desc_EN:
Crew Member 004
Mailbox: jun@redchamber.ship

The ID card I used after I became an official crew member. I'm so grateful for Eda. She took me in when I had nothing.
desc_CHS:
船员编号 004
船员信箱：leemuo@redchamber.ship

成为正式船员后，使用的身份识别卡。
当时我很感谢艾妲，是她收留了一无所有的我。

desc_EN:
"Myria neverlasting, serve none but the flower within," she said.

"The soul takes the form of a flower. Look not beyond yourselves, but tend to its every need."

When the class was over, Eda gave all the children a bag of seeds.
desc_CHS:
「万道无常，花开唯心。」她这么说。

「灵魂是花的形状，与其追求外在，不如拯救自己内心深处的花。」

课堂最后，艾妲送了一袋花卉的种子给孩子们。

desc_EN: The goddess of music and wielder of lumen energy. Besides the Ten Peaks, she was the first god to receive the gift of song from Helius. Her voice channeled the flow of lumen, bringing life to the land. Wherever she went, flowers bloomed.
desc_CHS: 后土是掌握龙脉能量的歌神，是除了十山诸神外，乙皇第一位授与歌法的神明，她的歌声能引导龙脉的流动，为土地带来生命，行经之处往往为花所覆盖。

desc_EN:
"By the light of Ignis, may your fortunes shine upon us, and cast away the darkness."

In areas outside of United Minings' jurisdiction, Many Peakers refused to use their currency. Instead, they used coins produced by the Myrian Ignis Guild, which were forged with trace amounts of lumen alloy.
desc_CHS:
「烛龙赐福，愿您出手如光，远离黑暗。」

矿联的势力范围外，许多群山人排斥使用矿联的货币信用点，仍在使用这由万道烛龙商会发行，混合了微量汜合金铸造的金币。
shop_desc_EN:
A common currency found around the asteroids, produced with trace amounts of lumen alloy to ensure value and prevent forgery.

Even though they're prohibited by United Mining, you can find a merchant who's willing to exchange them for credits at any space station.
shop_desc_CHS:
小行星普遍使用的货币，混合了微量汜合金以便保值和防伪。
尽管被矿联禁用，任何空间站都能找到愿意兑换成信用点的商家。

desc_EN: A tragic song recounting the loss of the Ring Liberation Front. Full of sadness, anger, and rebellious lament, it was also the war cry for anti-United Mining sentiment.
desc_CHS: 悲愤中带着狂野的叛乱气息，这首歌是哀悼星环自由战线的悲歌，也是曾经反叛矿联的战曲。

desc_EN:
Cave Lord: Jun Lee
"May Praesidio ensure your journeys are forever smooth."

"How ridiculous!" Eda laughed as she looked at the golden disc with my name on it. Even though she didn't want me to participate, I still remember her giving it her all as she cheered me on.
desc_CHS:
洞窟王：李莫
龙守保佑探勘无往不利
...
龙门谱面的金色圆盘镶着我的名字
「笨死了这什么...」艾妲看到时笑了出来，她虽然不赞成我做这种事，但我依然记得她在场外拼命加油的样子。
shop_desc_EN: In the Peaker markets, you can find a buyer for anything if you have the right contact.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山的市场上，只要有门道，几乎什么东西都能找到收购者。

desc_EN: I heard Remi say that this was initially developed by the Eiffel League for transmitting signals to guide ships. However, in the post-war world, its high pulsation output was used to modify ship communication systems and enhance electronic warfare capabilities.
desc_CHS: 听菈米亚说，这最早是艾菲尔同盟发送讯号，用来引导船只的设备，其强大的脉冲功率，在冲突后的今天却被用来改造通讯系统，强化电子作战的能力。
shop_desc_EN:
Manufacturer: Eiffel League 
(Dismantled Part - Like New)

Adjustable power output. Can be used for communication and electronic warfare. 

[Reprocessed by Shiratsuka Parts]
[We hope this part was destined for you]
shop_desc_CHS:
艾菲尔同盟原厂制造，拆卸后整理九成新
可调整功率，用于通讯或电子作战

[本品项为白冢零件打捞重制品]
[愿零件与你有美好的相遇]

desc_EN: From what I remember as a child, these were the same storage systems that unloaded our belongings from the ship when the clan master brought my mother and I back to the home of the Lee clan.
desc_CHS: 记得我还小时，那时母亲还在，家主接我们前往鸢家，后院停泊的飞船自动卸货，使用的就是这些模组化的仓储配件。
shop_desc_EN:
Manufacturer: East Ocean Alliance (Brand-New Antique)

Made from the finest materials, this storage unit boasts heavylifting capabilities like you've never seen before. Can be used to upgrade hangars. Suitable for standard civilian vessels.

[Reprocessed by Shiratsuka Parts]
[We hope this part was destined for you]
shop_desc_CHS:
瀛海龙脉同盟制造，全新中古货
真材实料，强悍承重
可用于改良格纳库，适用一般民间船型

[本品项为白冢零件打捞重制品]
[愿零件与你有美好的相遇]

desc_EN: No matter how many times Kay taught me, I was never good at installing electronics. Every time I had to dismantle an East Ocean control system, I couldn't help but get lost in those memories.
desc_CHS: 尽管大魁教过我不少次，但我依然不擅长电子配装，当年我在拆卸这些瀛海产的控制器组件时，常会陷入回忆。
shop_desc_EN:
Manufacturer: East Ocean Lumen Alliance (Brand-New Antique)

Auto-identification, low electricity use, and long-distance monitoring functions. Used for upgrading vessel control systems and electronic warfare.

[Reprocessed by Shiratsuka Parts]
[We hope this part was destined for you]
shop_desc_CHS:
瀛海龙脉同盟制造，全新中古货
自动识别，低耗电率，远程监控
可用于改进船舰控制系统，电子作战必备

[本品项为白冢零件打捞重制品]
[愿零件与你有美好的相遇]

desc_CHS: 因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.

desc_EN:
"This flower's often used to pray for peace or to grieve for those who have passed."

Eda said that in Myrian illustrations, wherever there was war, symbols of this flower could be seen.
desc_CHS:
「常被用于祈祷和平，有时候也会用来悼念亡者。」

艾妲说万道神话的绘图中，只要有战争出现的地方，多会看见这花的图腾。
shop_desc_EN: In Thousand Peaks, lumen plants are commonly traded items that have a wide range of medical and biochemical uses.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山，龙脉花卉通常是拿来交易的大宗商品，被广泛应用在医疗与生化方面。

desc_EN:
"It's said that the gods would inhale lumen to extend their lives. That's backed by science, you know."

Eda told me how the lumen plants found in Thousand Peaks were used for a variety of medical purposes.
desc_CHS:
「万道神话中，诸神透过吸食汜而延命，其实是很科学的。」

艾妲跟我解释，龙脉植物在群山，是如何被运用在各种医疗。
shop_desc_EN: In Thousand Peaks, lumen plants are commonly traded items that have a wide range of medical and biochemical uses.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山，龙脉花卉通常是拿来交易的大宗商品，被广泛应用在医疗与生化方面。

desc_EN: After being destroyed by exposure to extreme heat, crystallized stamen like this one would eventually shatter. Even without being able to make out what type of plant it was, the belief that lumen could regenerate cells ensured that it would go for a pretty credit on the market.
desc_CHS: 由于被高热破坏，这类干燥而结晶的花蕊碎裂，已难辨识原有的花种，却因为龙脉促进细胞再生的传言，混着贩售依然有不少买家。
shop_desc_EN: Even when a lumen plant hasn't grown very well, due to their medicinal qualities, they're always worth something in the markets.
shop_desc_CHS: 尽管生长状况不佳，龙脉花卉因为其作为药材的特性，在市场上始终有着良好的流通性

desc_EN:
"For the space burials of Peaker soldiers, they would use these flowers. My master didn't like the sight of them."

That's how Eda first introduced this flower to me, before telling me she hated them too.
desc_CHS:
「群山军人葬礼时，会使用的黑色花卉，师父不太喜欢。」

记得艾妲是这么介绍，她讨厌这花。
shop_desc_EN: In Thousand Peaks, lumen plants are commonly traded items that have a wide range of medical and biochemical uses.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山，龙脉花卉通常是拿来交易的大宗商品，被广泛应用在医疗与生化方面。

desc_EN: This map recorded the route of Red Chamber's plant trade. From the distant home of Eda and her master, it passed through three transport stations starting from the New Iran Solar System, all the way to Thousand Peaks. This multi-thousand light-year trade route took half a standard year for every round trip. Red Chamber was basically their second home.
desc_CHS: 记载着红楼花卉贸易的路线图，从遥远艾妲与师父的家，新伊朗行星系一路经过三个传送港，直到群山的万光年贸易，一趟可能要花半个标准年，红楼就像她们的第二个家。

desc_EN: A mural depicting Terra, the god of song and wielder of lumen energy. Shattered by an unknown force, it reminded me of the Witching Tower's demise after the Lumen War, and their firm belief in Myria Terra.
desc_CHS: 主掌龙脉能量的歌神后土，神像为不知名的力量劈裂，让我想到信仰万道后土的巫塔，在龙脉冲突后的下场。

desc_EN: This was the primary flora cultivated in Eda and her master's hometown. Its ground-up petals could be used as a throat remedy. I only found out later that this was where Eda's name came from.
desc_CHS: 艾妲与师父于家乡主要培育的作物，捣碎的花瓣可以用于治疗喉咙，我后来才知道，艾妲的名字跟这花有关。

desc_EN:
Fortuna Entertainment was probably the most well-known entertainment entity around. Their main operation was dealing lumen herbs, and they had small factories scattered around the belt. Taoyuan was nothing more than a side business.

I've heard that smoking a stick of their lumen herbs increases vitality and is a cure-all for a range of illnesses.
desc_CHS:
在小行星带富有盛名的贵人娱乐集团，真正经营的是龙脉药草生意，小行星带各处都有他们下线的小工厂，桃源乡只是他们的副业。

这种利用龙脉的植物做成的卷烟，听说有强精补气，免疫调节的功用。
shop_desc_EN: A common item found in Thousand Peaks' asteroid belt. Given their prevalence, they're pretty easy to sell.
shop_desc_CHS: 群山小行星带随处可见的交易品，具有一定的流通性，变卖很容易。

desc_EN: The alcohol of Thousand Peaks, unlike that of East Ocean, is pungent and strong, brimming with the smell of minerals and gunpowder. Kay always said that when I became the clan master, I had to give him some land for winemaking.
desc_CHS: 跟瀛海的酒不同，群山的酒精刺鼻而强烈，充满矿物与硝烟的味道，大魁总说等我成为家主后，要给他个封地酿酒。
shop_desc_EN: A common item found in Thousand Peaks' asteroid belt. Given their prevalence, they're pretty easy to sell.
shop_desc_CHS: 群山小行星带随处可见的交易品，具有一定的流通性，变卖很容易。

desc_EN: Ignis is Myria's god of creation, and when the flames of his creation faded, they became a blue crystalline essence which could be refined into a liquid or gas. United Mining used it as an industrial fuel, and it is known by its common name, lumen.
desc_CHS: 「汜」音同似，万道的创世神，恒星「烛龙」的火焰熄灭后，形成的蓝色晶体，提炼后可为液体或气体，是矿联人的工业燃料，世人俗称的龙脉。

desc_EN: I remember the mixture of emotions on Eda's face when we were told to head for Ironwind. It was clear that she really didn't like United Mining.
desc_CHS: 我还记得艾妲听到要前往铁岚城的港口时，脸上的复杂表情，她不喜欢矿联。

desc_EN: A sample of Eda's voice from when we first met. It was faint, as if it had been damaged. But her voice... it was so beautiful that I'll never forget it.
desc_CHS: 第一次遇到艾妲时，直接对她歌声采样的声音，她的歌声有点沙哑，像是受了伤，但很好听，我永远不会忘记。

desc_EN: If Kay knew that I got on my knees for him, he'd be so upset. But he just meant that much to me.
desc_CHS: 如果被大魁知道我为了他下跪，他一定会揍我，但他对我而言，就是这么重要。

desc_EN:
This text records the well-known Myrian myth of Ignis, the ancient god of creation. 

Ignis descended in a blazing inferno, and a flaming explosion formed ten fireballs, which became the ten planets. The flames faded and were reduced to an ice-blue essence, which then turned into lumen. The lumen was in constant flux, and eventually became the gods of Myria. This was the beginning of Ignis' creation of the world.
desc_CHS:
书中记载的是群山耳熟能详，古老的创世神「烛龙」的龙脉神话。

随烈炎降世的烛龙，爆发的火焰化为十个火团，成为行星十山。

火焰熄灭后化为冰蓝的魂魄，则成为龙脉，龙脉流转不停，最终化为了万道诸神，是为烛龙创世之始。

desc_EN:
According to myth, the Myrian Empire was annihilated by Ignis' fiery wrath because of Helius' excessive use of lumen to extend the lives of the gods.

Ignis was the omnipotent god of gods in Myrian myth. He was also the sun, the source of lumen energy, and the final resting place for all life.
desc_CHS:
神话中，烛龙愤怒的火焰毁灭了万道帝国，只因乙皇为了让诸神为了延续生命，过度运用了龙脉的能量。

烛龙是万道的全知全能神，也是太阳，是龙脉的能量源头，更是生命的归乡。

desc_EN:
Osman was a famous black hole scholar who spent his whole life trying to debunk the myths of Myria, for the glory of United Mining. 

"The first time I noticed Excidium was when I was researching the event horizon of the black hole. I would see large numbers of coffins full of lumen flowers heading toward the center... 

It was only after interviewing some people that I realized these were offerings to Excidium. Having sinned against Ignis, they feared they would be sent to Exidium and hoped to be forgiven and granted a chance at rebirth."
desc_CHS:
奥斯曼是矿联有名的黑洞学者，一生努力破解万道的迷信，荣耀矿联。
...
最早注意到大荒，是因为在边境调查时，发现有许多抛往大荒的奇妙空棺材，里面放满龙脉的花卉。

我找了些万道居民访谈后，才知道这些都是送给大荒的供品，他们因为得罪烛龙，深怕被打入大荒，故透过供品祈祷大荒轻判，来世还有复活机会...

desc_EN: In Myrian mythology, there were ten planetary gods, known as the Four Peaks of Heaven and the Six Peaks of Earth. But now, there are only four observable planets in Thousand Peaks, and most of them are mired in electromagnetic storms, making it difficult to harvest their resources.
desc_CHS: 万道神话中有十个行星神，分为天上部的四山，以及地上部的六山，如今群山在可观测的领域中，却仅存四座行星，且多为电磁风暴覆盖，能源难以开采。

name_CHS: 重要方位：斑鸠的三手情报
name_CHT: 重要方位：斑鳩的三手情報
desc_EN: A set of coordinates that Benzel gave to us... I mean Remi. Given that it came from the black market, we didn't have much hope for it. After all, who knows how many hands it had passed through.
desc_CHS: 斑鸠送给我们…不，是送给菈米亚的座标，大家那时对抱什么期望，毕竟是从黑市流通出来，不知道转了几手的商品。

desc_EN: All I remember is you holding me... Nothing else mattered.
desc_CHS:
那时我只记得你抱着我，
剩下什么都忘了。

desc_EN: It was as if you were being stared down by guardians. The lumen in here gave off the sense of overwhelming oppression.
desc_CHS: 仿佛有诸多守卫看着自己一样，这里的龙鸣充满压迫的感受。

desc_EN: I still remember the startled look on Eda's face when Kay scribbled the instructions on the piece of paper I handed to her. She never would have thought that the Oceaner guardian who stood beside her was a seasoned Lumen War veteran.
desc_CHS: 我还记得，大魁将操作步骤列出给女巫的时候，艾妲一脸错愕的表情，她没想到，路边的瀛海亲卫，竟然是参加过龙脉冲突的老手。

desc_EN:
Red left this chip behind. It was able to restore Red Chamber's scanning power to what it was during the war.

Thinking back on it, I feel so foolish... At the time, I had no idea what Eda was really looking for.
desc_CHS:
红留下来的芯片，可以让红楼的探测仪回到战争时期的水准。

现在想想觉得自己很傻，直到那时，都没能察觉艾妲真正寻找的龙脉是什么。

desc_EN: I was really grateful to Benzel, but I was young, and it was hard for me to accept that as an exile, I couldn't handle everything myself.
desc_CHS: 很感谢斑鸠，但年少的我却很难接受，自己会这样到处流亡。

name_CHS: 座标：后冲突军人之家「鬼方」
name_CHT: 座標：後衝突軍人之家「鬼方」
desc_EN: Dr. Rushell was always nagging us about something, but sometimes... I really miss her.
desc_CHS: 罗素医生就是唠叨了点，但我有时候蛮想念她的。

name_CHS: 重要方位：协会登记的龙脉
name_CHT: 重要方位：協會登記的龍脈
desc_EN: Eda said that during the years they spent searching for her master, the doctor always watched out for them.
desc_CHS: 听艾妲说，她们寻找师父这几年间，都是医生在照顾。

desc_EN:
Captain: Red Grant
Ship ID: HON20225-XO
Class: QBC-OPUS-03 Lumen Seeking Vessel
Expiration Date: N/A. Expires upon discharge
Valid Region: Thousand Peaks
desc_CHS:
船长：红・葛兰特
船ID：HON20225-XO
级别：QBC-OPUS-03 龙脉探测船

有效日期：随葛兰特服役结束自动解除
有效区域：群山全境

desc_EN: Military-grade provisions commonly seen during the war. Kay once suggested that the main reason United Mining won the war may not have been because of the witches, but because of their superior food logistics.
desc_CHS: 战争时期常见的军用口粮，大魁曾分析指出，矿业联合胜利的核心或许不是女巫，而是强而有力的粮食后勤。
shop_desc_EN: Due to the rise of the post-war scavenging industry, this is a common find in the ruins. Given their prevalence, they're pretty easy to sell.
shop_desc_CHS: 龙脉冲突后由于拾荒业兴起，废墟中挖掘的交易品随手可见，具有一定的流通性，变卖很容易。

name_CHS: 菈米亚撷取的对话记录
name_CHT: 菈米亞擷取的對話記錄
desc_EN:
Subject: Jun ｜ Eda
Time: 8535/0910/40231
Ref: 434HT: 8834JC
﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍
Eda: I'll stop by later.
Jun: If you come over too often, Remi is going to get mad sooner or later.
desc_CHS:
通话者：李莫｜艾妲
时间：8535\0910\40231
通话代号：434HT：8834JC
﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍﹍
艾妲：晚点我会过去
李莫：太常过来，迟早菈米亚会生气的

desc_EN: The mark of Red Chamber is a flower, which Eda said represented the new era witches. Her master believed that the shape of our souls took the form of a flower, and instead of resorting to violence to achieve peace, witches should tend to the flower within.
desc_CHS:
红楼的标记是个花卉图腾。
艾妲说，这是新生代女巫的标记，师父认为人内心的灵魂是花的形状，而女巫与其为了追求和平而杀戮，不如拯救自己内心深处的花。

desc_EN: Remi's uniform was rather small, and it wasn't until later that I realized that Eda had stitched it together one thread at a time. It was I who had stepped into their lives.
desc_CHS:
菈米亚的制服比较小件，我后来才知道这是艾妲一针针完成的制服。
是我介入了她们两人的生活。

desc_EN:
Product: Sunny Red
Scientific name: Jee Lun 
Location: East Ocean Import

Tolerant to dry and wet climates. Flowering season is brief, favors nutritive-packed soil and is difficult to flower.
desc_CHS:
品名：日红
学名：莫里海英
产地：瀛海进口
耐旱耐湿，然花季短促，重视土壤混合营养浓度，不容易开花。

desc_EN:
Product: Blue Orphan
Scientific name: Iemr Nairod
Location: Thousand Peaks

Growth period is 70-80 Standard Days. It has a thick stalk and is unsuitable for most environments. If the environment is too humid, the root system will rot.
desc_CHS:
品名：孤城
学名：多伦亜米兰
产地：群山原生种
生长期约70-80标准日，植珠厚实，可生长环境少，栽培环境若过于潮湿，会导致根体腐坏。

desc_EN:
Scientific name: Eda Lune 
Location: United Mining New Iran

Fragile and difficult to care for. Its sweet fragrance makes it a popular flower.

Floriography: Please forgive me.
desc_CHS:
学名：艾妲拉姆
产地：行星矿业联合新伊朗
娇贵，栽培不易，花香浓烈为人喜爱。
花语：请原谅我

desc_EN:
Among all the memories of my journey, this was the most meaningless.

Given all the invaluable ruins that the Red Chamber Crew has uncovered in Thousand Peaks, we hereby confer its crew with this award and a level 1 excavation permit to thank them for their contributions.

Eda, Remi, Jun

8534, Galactic Calendar
desc_CHS:
记忆中，我觉得最没有意义的东西。
...
红楼船队为群山多次发掘重大遗迹，贡献无数，特颁此状，以资感谢，并授予一级探勘人证明。
艾妲、菈米亚、李莫
受勋于银河历8534年。

desc_EN: Even after all these years, Kay didn't leave much behind. But carefully tucked away in a box was the blade I gave him when I became the family heir. It represented that he was the head of security and essentially part of our family.
desc_CHS: 随我流亡的大魁没有留下太多东西，只有这被小心的收于盒中，那是我成为少主后赐予他的短刃，代表了亲卫之首，仅次于家人。

desc_EN:
Remi Dorian
Parents: _____
Place of Birth: Thousand Peaks

As a victim of human trafficking, the place that was supposed to record Remi's parents was left blank. She said her full name was: 
"Cozy Remi Chocolate, manufactured by the Dorian Corp."

Some soldier had given her chocolates, and she thought the name sounded nice.
desc_CHS:
菈米亚・多伦多
父母：＿＿＿＿
出生地：群山

做为被人口贩子转卖的小孩，菈米亚父母栏是空白的，至于名字，她说全名是：
菈米亚快适巧克力｜制造商：多伦多公司
是一个军人送她的干粮，她觉得好听。

desc_EN:
Exporter: Ironwind Traders Guild
Products: Lumen fennel, witch's rose, lumenite powder

A fake export slip made by Remi. It wasn't until later on that I found out Remi used to work as a technician for a smuggler called Toran. She said he was a terrible person, but that he taught her a lot.
desc_CHS:
出口单位：铁岚城商业公会
货物名称：龙茴香、巫香瑰、粉碎汜晶石

菈米亚伪造的出货水单，好久以后她才告诉我，她的童年是跟一个叫图罗的人跑走私船，她那时就是机械船师，她说对方是个烂人，但教了她很多。

desc_EN: The ripples of the lumenide gave off brilliant ice-blue rays of light, proof that the cave was of immense value.
desc_CHS: 汜水的涟漪散发耀眼的冰蓝光芒，那是具有高价开采价值的证明。

desc_EN: A fractured and degraded starsong... likely caused by mining activity. It didn't matter how anxious I was, everywhere I went, someone had already gotten to the lumen.
desc_CHS: 破碎而断裂的龙鸣声，应该是矿脉爆炸造成的，尽管我很急，但当时我怎么找，都是别人探勘过的龙脉。

name_EN: Loose Pages from a Terra Hymnal 2
desc_EN:
The bookmark fashioned from lumenite seemed to react to Eda. The text was from the final pages of a Terra Hymnal. 

It described how Terra sang for an eternity into the void to keep Myria alive. She used her song to channel the flow of lumen from across the stars and prolong the lives of the gods.

It also appeared to contain decipherments of Myrian inscriptions.
desc_CHS:
汜晶做的书签，似乎跟艾妲互相感应，内文是后土歌本的最后几页。

描述后土如何在无尽的岁月之中，为求万道不死，于虚空持续歌唱，用歌声导引群星间的龙脉，为诸神延续生命。

似乎记载着万道符文解译的方法。

name_EN: Lumen Cave 04: Red Chamber Perfect Starsong
desc_EN: Sample of a perfect starsong, both in terms of its radiance and audio quality. However, by then my focus was on helping Eda find her master. Everything else didn't matter that much.
desc_CHS: 不论音质还是光芒，都堪称完美的龙鸣样本，但对那时的我而言，寻找矿脉除了协助艾妲找到师父外，其余都是附加了。

name_EN: Lumen Cave 05: Red Chamber Perfect Starsong
desc_EN: Although I was there to find Eda's master, I was unable to forget that vivid memory of being struck by the burning blue flames.
desc_CHS: 虽然那时在寻找艾妲的师父，但我却忘不了那炽热、记忆中熊熊燃烧的蓝焰。

desc_EN: Even though Oceaners were known to go where the lumen was, and for many generations settled in other solar systems, at the time I didn't understand what this charm really represented.
desc_CHS: 追逐龙脉的瀛海，世代有人旅居各方星系，但那时我还不知道，这徽章的意义。

desc_EN:
Black Hole Observation Log 8536/02/22

The black hole is as black as the coffee in my cup. Sir, the coffee's all gone, so my brain's not working anymore. But it's fine. When the supply ship arrives today, I'll just jump on board and get the hell outta here.

Results: Nothing unusual
Analyst: John
desc_CHS:
黑洞观测站检查表
8536/02/22

黑洞宛如我手中的咖啡般漆黑。
长官，咖啡喝完了，我什么都记不住了。
但没关系，今天补给船来时一并送我回去就好。

结果：无异常
检查人员：约翰

desc_EN:
6 Orbis, 10 Circum, 5 Gradus
Praesidio Composes Thus

The blazing skies and lumenic chaos,
are occurrances of nature's accord.
The burden belongs not to Terra,
nor is it my responsibility.
She shall continue to sing,
for the longevity of the kingdom.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守谱于
六轮十天五地

天火频繁，群脉乱象乃自然之象，
非吾之责，亦非后土之责，
后土当继续行歌，以求国祚长久。

desc_EN:
In the second act, Terra's song created an everlasting flow of lumen, granting the Sanctums immortality. This violated the laws of Ignis, and in fear of divine retribution, six gods rebelled, sacrificing Terra to Ignis and sparking the holy war.

After the performance ended, I heard Eda murmuring the final words Terra spoke to Helius before she was killed.
"Should we find each other in the next life, let us live on a planet of our own. I will plant flowers among the valleys, and sing for you into old age and death."

To be honest, I remember my time with Eda more than the details of the story.
desc_CHS:
故事中部，由于后土的歌声使龙脉不灭，众道不死，破坏了烛龙的法则，恐惧天罚的六位诸神叛变，杀后土而献烛龙，引爆天地战争。

我记得艾妲看完后，
始终呢喃着后土死前，对乙皇的话语：
「若来世再遇，就找一个无人的行星生活，我会将花种满山谷，为你而歌，老死方休。」

而我只记得艾妲的侧脸。

desc_EN:
Black Hole Imaging Backup
Date: 8536/03/11

Level 2 Confidential Military Information. Do not read if you do not have the requisite authorization.
desc_CHS:
黑洞显像纪录备份
时间：8536/03/11

二级军事机密数据，无授权请勿查阅。

desc_EN:
Password Hint's Hint
United Mining Calendar: YYYY/MM/DD

I usually don't look at the year or the month. Coffee only comes once a month anyway.
desc_CHS:
密码提示的提示
矿业联合纪年法：年 / 月 / 日

我通常不看年份也不看月份，毕竟咖啡每月只来一次。

name_CHS: 「ORKISE」藏身巷弄的铁岚城私宅料理
name_CHT: 「ORKISE」藏身巷弄的鐵嵐城私宅料理
desc_EN:
"Only your true love would take you here.
- Peaks Top 100 gave it 4.5 stars!

No menu, a private wine collection, and a suite with a view that gazed beyond the galaxy. It was more than just delicious dishes, it was an unforgettable experience with a loved one."

Even though it was ridiculously expensive, Orkise was still one of the most popular date locations for Peaker couples.
desc_CHS:
只有最爱你的人，才愿意带你来这里
~群山100四星半推荐~

尽管价格惊人，ORKISE依然是群山情人约会首选TOP 10，经典无菜单料理，私藏的酒窖，以及一览外银河星群的别致雅房，让你满足口腹之余，更与最爱享受一生难忘的时光。

desc_EN: Due to the mission's requirements, the doctor wanted us to attend a press meeting at the Lumen War Memorial. She didn't tell us who we'd be meeting, just that they'd find us when we got there.
desc_CHS: 依照任务要求，医生希望我们参加冲突纪念馆的一场媒体会，没有指出对象，只说委托人当场会找我们。

desc_EN: Because of this chip, I saw Eda agitated in a way I'd never seen before. She was always so calm. I never thought she'd get that furious when her master was brought up.
desc_CHS: 这芯片让我第一次看到艾妲冲动的样子，我没想到平时冷静的她，提到师父可以愤怒成这样。

desc_EN:
Manufacturer: United Provision Farm
Expiration Date: 8540 Galactic Calendar

Contents: Stellar Beer, Molecular Organic Vegetables, Pure Ironwind Water, Synthetic Meat, Artificial Eggs, Comprehensive Spice Set, Protein Bar
desc_CHS:
制造：矿联粮食农场
保存期限：银河历8540年

内含：
星火啤酒、分子有机蔬菜、 铁岚城清净水、生态合成肉、人工蛋、综合香料组、便携式蛋白棒。
shop_desc_EN: In the Peaker markets, you can find a buyer for anything if you have the right contact.

desc_EN:
Thousand Peaks Civil College often sent out expedition parties, and their notes could occasionally be found within the caves.

"Summary of the 3rd Research Expedition:
Lumen is a multidimensional energy. It flows through space-time but is difficult to stabilize. However, it has been found to react to emotion, and the most common method for stabilizing it within three-dimensional space is through its resonance with song, which causes it to take on gaseous, liquid or solid form."
desc_CHS:
群山公民大学常送出探险队，龙脉中不时会找到遗落的笔记
...
第三次研究团探险摘要
汜是一种多维的能量，在时空中流动难以固定，却会对情绪起反应，常见的做法是透过歌声与它共振，就能将它固定在三维的时空，此时汜会以气体、液体或是固体的方式出现，成为我们俗称的龙脉。
shop_desc_EN: The intel markets are happy to purchase all sorts of documents. What looks like useless information might one day reveal some hidden treasures.

desc_EN: This may be just a pile of scrap metal, but the Peakers could always find a way to turn rubble into treasure.
desc_CHS: 虽然不过就是些杂乱的金属碎块，但是在群山总是有人能找到方式，让这些废弃物发挥价值。
shop_desc_EN: Due to the rise of the post-war scavenging industry, this is a common find in the ruins.
shop_desc_CHS: 龙脉冲突后由于拾荒业兴起，废墟中挖掘的交易品随手可见。

desc_EN: A bunch of cheap seeds lumped together. Still, there was always someone who would buy them.
desc_CHS: 多种价格较低的龙脉花卉种子被混在了一块，尽管如此，市场上依然有不少买家。
shop_desc_EN: Even when a lumen plant hasn't grown very well, due to their medicinal qualities, they're always worth something in the markets.
shop_desc_CHS: 尽管生长状况不佳，龙脉花卉因为其作为药材的特性，在市场上始终有着良好的流通性

desc_EN:
"Burning this will create a dense blue smoke, which the Myrian believers think can be used to communicate with Ignis."

Eda told me that places you find this plant would often have an air of sadness
desc_CHS:
「烧灼会产生迷离的蓝雾，万道信众认为，这是用于跟烛龙沟通的灵烟。」

有它的地方，多少会带点悲伤，艾妲是如此解释。
shop_desc_EN: In Thousand Peaks, lumen plants are commonly traded items that have a wide range of medical and biochemical uses.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山，龙脉花卉通常是拿来交易的大宗商品，被广泛应用在医疗与生化方面。

desc_EN:
"To become more sensitive to lumen, witches would drink lumenide with a little bit of congealed cattail."

However, the amount had to be controlled. If you drank too much, you'd get lost in the flow of lumen and start hallucinating.
desc_CHS:
「为了训练汜的感应能力，女巫会生饮浸泡小量蒲生凝的汜水。」

但用量要控制，因为浓度稍有不对，就会让人迷失在汜的流动中，看见幻觉。
shop_desc_EN: In Thousand Peaks, lumen plants are commonly traded items that have a wide range of medical and biochemical uses.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山，龙脉花卉通常是拿来交易的大宗商品，被广泛应用在医疗与生化方面。

desc_EN: This medicine has been banned for a long time. Eda saw countless children in the Witching Tower overuse the substance, which made them unable to distinguish between reality and illusion, forever lost in Myrian space-time.
desc_CHS: 被长期禁用的药材，艾妲亲眼看过，巫塔的小孩为了训练而过度使用，导致无法分清现实，迷失在万道的时空。
shop_desc_EN: In Thousand Peaks, lumen plants are commonly traded items that have a wide range of medical and biochemical uses.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山，龙脉花卉通常是拿来交易的大宗商品，被广泛应用在医疗与生化方面。

desc_EN: The first time I saw this I was shocked. In East Ocean, you'd have to buy all these tools separately, but here they'd put them all into one convenient exploration kit. Only in Thousand Peaks, where almost everybody was a runner, could you find stuff like this.
desc_CHS: 当时我吓了一跳，在瀛海得分批购买的各种道具，一次都被打包在这探索设备中，唯有全民龙脉探勘的群山，才买得到这种组件。
shop_desc_EN:
Peakers call this a scavenger's best friend. The perfect choice for excavation.

Release Date: 8533 (Luma Caverna)
Contents: Lumium light, disposable robot, EM compass, synthetic fiber bag, dynamite
Measurements: 2490ｘ1500ｘ610 mm
Weight: 2350g
shop_desc_CHS:
群山拾荒人们最可靠的伙伴，前往废弃地区的最佳选择。
龙洞化工 8533 年出品
内容物：简便型汜气灯、抛弃式机器人、电磁指南针、高强度合成纤维收纳袋、安全炸药
尺寸：2490ｘ1500ｘ610 mm
重量：2350g

desc_CHS: 因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.
因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.
因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.
因为是合成品项，不会有collection desc.

desc_EN:
"...We need backup... the Ring Liberation Front has broken through our entrance... By the glory of the united... open the d-damn door..."

The screen kept looping the same footage. It was the last thing recorded before the sentry station was taken out.
desc_CHS:
「...需要支援...星环自由战线已经突破了本登入口...天佑矿业联合...该死的星火你们开门啊...」

屏幕上重复播放的影像，是哨站陷落前的记录影像。
shop_desc_EN: The intel markets are happy to purchase all sorts of documents. What looks like useless information might one day reveal some hidden treasures.
shop_desc_CHS: 情报商们乐意在市场上收购各种档案，没人知道这些看似无用的数据，何时会发挥奇效。

name_EN: Group Photo in a Field of Flowers
desc_EN: Eda told me that her master spent a lot of time and effort to find a plot of land where she could grow and cultivate lumen plants. After she left the Witching Tower, she grew up surrounded by flowers.
desc_CHS: 听艾妲说，师父花了很多力气，终于找到了一亩可以栽种龙脉植物的地方，于是自从离开巫塔后，她就在花海里长大。
游戏不显示

desc_EN:
1 Orbis, 0 Circum, 0 Gradus
Praesidio Composes Thus

This mural depicts the myth of how Ignis' ice-blue essence was transformed into lumen after his flames had faded. The lumen flowed without end, eventually giving birth to the Myrian gods. However, their inability to control the energy of Ignis within them meant that at any moment, they might be engulfed in flames of suffering.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守制图于
首轮无天无地

图描述的，是神话中的烛龙的火焰熄灭后，冰蓝的魂魄成为「龙脉」，而流转不停的龙脉则化为万道诸神，却因为无法驾驭烛龙的能量，随时都会被吞噬燃烧，陷入苦难。

desc_EN: After the war, it wasn't too hard to find some outdated industry intel in the abandoned areas. Even outdated info could earn some credits if it was analyzed and organized the right way.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突后，废墟间常有机会取得一些过期的商业数据。
整理后通常可以换到不错的价格。
shop_desc_EN: Due to the rise of the post-war scavenging industry, this is a common find in the ruins.
shop_desc_CHS: 龙脉冲突后由于拾荒业兴起，废墟中挖掘的交易品随手可见。

desc_EN:
1 Orbis, 5 Circum, 3 Gradus
Praesidio Illustrates Thus

This mural depicts how Helius drifted with Ignis for aeons, and when he heard that the gods were constantly tormented by their inner flames, he decided to help them use the lumen's energy and descended from the heavens.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守制图于
首轮五天三地

图描述的，是随侍烛龙漂泊亿万年的乙皇，听闻诸神为体内火焰所苦，于心不忍，决心告知如何善用龙脉的能量，因而降世。

desc_EN:
"By Taiyang's mercy, let the lumen guide your way."

Wherever there was an East Ocean cave, you would find lumenite discs gifted by the emperor. My family shrine had one as well, and my mother said on the day that I was born, a rare solar flare storm occurred. Countless space stations were rendered unable to function, but many barren caves began to produce lumen, creating a prosperous year for East Ocean.

Children born that year were said to bring good luck, and were gifted this disc by the emperor.
desc_CHS:
「太乙垂怜，龙脉总有活路。」
只要是瀛海的龙脉矿场，都会有瀛海王赠与的汜晶盘。

然而家里的神坛也有一个。
母亲说过，我出生那天极光闪现，恒星太乙发生罕见的恒星闪焰，尽管瘫痪了不少空间站，数个荒废的龙脉矿场却发生共振，汜的产量回升，成为瀛海的丰收年。

当年诞生的婴孩被认为带来好运，受到瀛海王馈赠此物。

name_EN: Negotiation Transcript Between East Ocean and United Mining
name_CHS: 瀛海与矿联谈判逐字稿
name_CHT: 瀛海與礦聯談判逐字稿
desc_EN:
"By giving up the rights to this transport station, you are ensuring a prosperous future for both United Mining and East Ocean here in Thousand Peaks."

A recording of deals made concerning the East Ocean transport station, which was critical during the war. But in the end, we were betrayed by United Mining. Now, the people of East Ocean refuse to bring it up out of shame.
desc_CHS:
如果愿意让出传送港的所有权，矿业联合愿意与瀛海于群山共存共荣。
...
纪录中涉及到战争时关键的瀛海传送港谈判，但矿联最后的背叛，让瀛海上下将这交易视为耻辱，不愿提起。

desc_EN:
6 Orbis, 10 Circum, 20 Gradus
Praesidio Illustrates Thus

This mural depicts the later years of the Myrian Empire, when Terra's song caused heaven and earth to split, with the Peaks of Heaven rising up in support of Helius, and the Peaks of Earth rising up to support Ignis. Though her song ultimately sparked the holy war, all Terra wanted was peace.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守制图于
六轮十天二十地

图描述的，是万道帝国后期，天地因后土之歌，分裂为支持乙皇的天上部，与支持烛龙的地上部，两方掀起天地战争，而后土只望群星间和平共处。

desc_EN:
3 Orbis, 1 Circum, 2 Gradus
Praesidio Illustrates Thus

The mural depicts the first god to be granted song, Terra. Following Helius' commands, she instructed the Servums in holy song, which turned them into choirs of Sanctums. This marked the beginning of Myria and its mighty lumen Empire.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守制图于
三轮一天二地

图描述的，
是首位被赐予歌法的神明「后土」。

后土依乙皇之命，将导引龙脉的歌法赐予十山诸神以外的众卒，使之成为能歌的「道」，是为万道起源，龙脉帝国之始。

desc_EN:
1 Orbis, 7 Circum, 6 Gradus
Praesidio Illustrates Thus

This mural depicts how Helius descended to save the gods from the suffering caused by their internal flames. He chose ten gods to care for the ten planets, who became known as the Ten Peaks. Helius then commanded the deities to find lumen and erect temples wherever they went, which led to the flourishing of Thousand Peaks.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守制图于
一轮七天六地

图描述的，是乙皇降世拯救众生于火焰之苦后，挑选了十位左右手，分封群山十大行星，统称十山诸神，并令诸神广寻龙脉，四处立殿，终于造就群山龙脉的盛状。

desc_EN:
Even though East Ocean history is only over a hundred years old, a small number of people believe that it has a direct connection to Myria.

They believe that Taiyang is a fragment of Helius' soul which drifted throughout East Ocean for millennia, turning into the winds among stars, then seeping into the lumen and eventually the consciousness of mankind. More than a hundred years ago, those people became the East Ocean nobles.
desc_CHS:
瀛海历史只有一百多年，却被少数人认为才是万道的正统。

他们认为太乙是乙皇灵魂的碎片，千代万代在瀛海流转幻化，化为行星间的风，终成龙脉，最终成人，并于百多年前，成为今日的瀛海贵族。

desc_EN:
"Why'd you buy me this?"

I still remember the awkward look on Remi's face when I gave her this wrench, almost as if she didn't want to admit that she kind of liked it.
desc_CHS: 「买这给我做什么。」我还记得菈米亚收到扳手时，露出的别扭表情。
shop_desc_EN:
Made by Trash Mountain
10 Years of Peace: Collector's Edition
Light and adjustable, multi-angle wrench.

Suitable for: Signal Terminals, Concentric Connectors, Spaceship Structures, Various Casters
shop_desc_CHS:
垃圾山出品
龙脉冲突后10年纪念款
轻量可动式，多角度活动扳手
适用范围：
讯号接头、同轴连接器、飞船机构、各式轮脚。

desc_EN:
3 Orbis, 1 Circum, 2 Gradus
Praesidio Illustrates Thus

This mural depicts a massive map of the stars, showing how Terra used song to channel the lumen. The distributed points are supposedly an arrangement of lumen caves in Thousand Peaks aeons ago. It has been hypothesized that it was a way to use the stars to transmutate lumen on a large scale.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守制图于
三轮六天十地

图描述的是神明后土透过歌声，引导龙脉的庞大星图，分布的点被认为群山龙脉万年前的排列，被推测是一种利用行星排列，导引汜的大型风水活动。

desc_EN:
"Prothesis Energy... Life revitalized."

From the big letters on the shipping container, you could tell it was filled with parts for prostheses. 

After the war, given the number of Peakers that relied on bionic prostheses, these specialized prosthetic arms used for lumen excavation and scavenging were a popular commodity on the market.
desc_CHS:
「义体动力，重获新生。」
货柜的封条写着红色的大字，是龙脉冲突后的义体零组件。

冲突后，由于大量的群山居民需要依靠义体维生，这种特化的龙脉与拾荒用手臂，成为热门的抢手货。

desc_EN: The inscriptions on Myrian valves are like small Myrian gates. They're used to direct the flow of lumen, and the whole contraption they're a part of are known as lumen transmutation engines.
desc_CHS: 龙阀的谱面宛若小型的龙门，万道利用它导引汜的流动，相关的装置被现代人称为「龙脉风水机关」。

desc_EN:
"By Taiyang's mercy, may the radiance of East Ocean greet your return."

Whether it's Myria Taiyang, Myria Ignis, or Myria Helius, the Myrian faith believes that the source of all energy is lumen and that it arises from the stars. As such, the light from the star of the solar system in which you were born will always be your soul's divine homeland.
desc_CHS:
「太乙垂怜，魂归瀛海日照。」

不论是万道太乙、万道烛龙，或是万道乙皇都一样，万道认为一切能量源于龙脉，而龙脉的源头便是太阳，依据每个人出生的星系，恒星的光便是你灵魂的神乡。
shop_desc_EN:
Secondhand Artifact Clearance
9th East Ocean Clan Amulet

A ceremonial item imprinted with East Ocean's god prime, Taiyang. East Ocean surrendered in the early days of war and their space station was destroyed by United Mining. The decline of the once prosperous East Ocean is reflected in the amulet's cracks and burns. Its value goes without saying.
shop_desc_CHS:
二手文物限量出清
瀛海第九家族护符
此符印有瀛海主神，太乙，为祭祀用品。
龙脉冲突初，瀛海投降，空间站遭矿业联合毁灭，此护符同遭掷损，火烧留痕，道尽瀛海盛衰，其价值不言而喻。

desc_EN:
9 Orbis, 7 Circum, 10 Gradus
Praesidio Composes Thus

I cannot prevent the flames of Ignis,
Let thy Sanctums go in peace, 
and return as light as light.

Terra has been buried. 
Oh, that it may be sufficient! 
May we meet again.

The large inscriptions, full of tragedy and sorrow, records the final words of Helius.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守谱于
九轮七天十地

孤无能阻止烛龙之炎，
愿众道归去无伤，归来如光，
后土已葬，孤愿足矣，来世再遇。
...
巨大谱面的符文，解析后却略微悲伤，那是神明乙皇的绝命词。

desc_EN: As the largest holder of lumium reserves, United Mining caves regularly produced 98 Hybrid Lumium. It was the most common type of fuel in Thousand Peaks, and was distributed just about everywhere.
desc_CHS: 掌握了汜气蕴藏的矿业联合，矿场定期出产的98级汜气，是群山民间流通最大的燃料种类，几乎各地都有流通。
shop_desc_EN:
Manufacturer: United Mining (Ironwind Certified)

Cherish the environment. Use 98 Hybrid Lumium.

[Lumium is a highly flammable chemical. Handle with care]
shop_desc_CHS:
行星矿业联合装运制造
矿联汜气加工厂检验合格标志
使用98混合汜气，为环境尽一份心
[汜气为高度易燃化学原料，请使用者确保安全。 ]

desc_EN:
A genealogy of the Lee clan, which records several Taiyang solar flare storms that occurred over the generations and the children that were born during them.

Since I was born during one of these storms, my mother had great hopes for me, and believed that the soul of Taiyang was within me. But after my mother died, no one else ever brought it up.
desc_CHS:
里面是瀛海鸢的族谱，记载了鸢家历史中，十几次太乙周期性的恒星闪焰，以及其间诞生的孩子。

我因为出生在闪焰当日，母亲一直对我寄予厚望，认为太乙的灵魂常在我心，但自从母亲过世后，就没有任何人跟我提过这件事了。

desc_EN:
Source: Lumen Cave 745
Recorder: Jun Lee
Source: Lumen Ziggurat
Recorder: Jun Lee
