At the time, for the convenience of cave running, I took care to look after the starsongs that Eda had recorded. To this day, I still miss the sound of her voice.
desc_CHS:
音源所属-小行星龙脉745
录制者 李莫
音源所属-万道风引所
录制者 李莫
...
当时为了探勘方便，艾妲录制的女巫龙鸣被我细心地保存。直到今天，我依然很想念她的歌声。

desc_EN:
In those few years with Eda, we marked out all the caves we had explored on this star map. By Taiyang's mercy, I thank lumen every day for bringing me to her.

Not a day passes that I don't miss the time we spent together.
desc_CHS:
那几年间与艾妲一起，我们将探索过的龙脉，陆续从星图间点出，太乙垂怜，感谢龙脉让我与女巫相伴。

直到今天，我依然很怀念那些时光。

name_EN: Scripture: Splitting of the Ten Peaks (Part 2)
desc_EN:
Authored by the Lumen Association, based on archaeological data from Myrian ruins.

At the end of the holy war, it was Helius who reigned victorious, and by his own hand he slayed the six gods who had supported Ignis. Enraged, Ignis descended with heavenly wrath and dispersed the gods among the stars with fiery winds.

This is where Myrian myth ends, but the Peakers believed that the souls of these gods were fused with the stars, mixed into the earth, eventually giving birth to humanity.
desc_CHS:
龙脉协会所著，内容多半来自于龙脉遗迹的考古数据。

天地战争最后，乙皇胜出，并亲手摧毁了支持烛龙的六山诸神，烛龙愤而降世，天火喷发，诸神随火焰之风吹飞，消散于遥远的星辰间。

万道相关的神话到此结束，但群山人都相信，这些散落于群星间的诸神，它们的灵魂镶嵌于星群间，与土混合，最终成人，是为人类之始。
shop_desc_EN:
Border Patrol Confiscated Item 
Banned Item Clearance
Secondhand Book (Good Condition)
Cover art by the well-known Myrian artist, Toola.
shop_desc_CHS:
边境巡逻局船舰查扣品项
违禁品出清
二手书七成新
本书封面由知名万道艺术家，图拉先生设计。

desc_EN:
Military report on the research of Lumen

"Although the findings are only speculative, the investigation team has long researched lumen's gravitational effects. They conjecture that lumen may influence gravitational fields. If this has something to do with the disappearance of six planets from Thousand Peaks, it would be a big step forward for the military."
desc_CHS:
汜的军事研究报告
...
虽然只是推测，但调查团研究龙脉的重力已久，推测「汜」会对重力场产生影响，如果这跟过往群山消失的六个行星有关，不排除是军事上一大进步。
shop_desc_EN: The intel markets are happy to purchase all sorts of documents. What looks like useless information might one day reveal some hidden treasures.

desc_EN:
The screen kept looping the same choppy footage.

"Welcome to... Unity News Channel 79... glorious citizens of United Mining. Today the Galactic Empire has made yet another b-breakthrough... in the research of lumen..."
desc_CHS:
屏幕重复播放着断断续续的内容

「欢迎收看...频道79号统合电视台...伟大的矿业联合人民们，近日统合体于龙脉的调查又跨出崭新的发展...」

desc_EN:
"Water winds the wind, and wind will birth a starsong."

Lumen is particularly stable and is not affected by increased heat. However, it does react to certain frequencies, which converts it from liquid to gas, while emitting a resounding bellow. This peculiar process is known as "transmutation", and the sound is referred to as a "starsong".
desc_CHS:
「水生而风动，风动而龙鸣。」

「汜」异常安定，加热也不会变化，却会对特定声音的频率反应，由液体质变为气体，并发出怒吼般的声响，这种异常的过程被称为「风转」，也被称为「龙鸣」。

desc_EN: At the time, I didn't understand why Red Chamber had a greenhouse, or where Eda's passion for flowers came from.
desc_CHS: 当时我不太懂，为什么红楼会有温室，而为什么艾妲对花卉的热情，又如此多。
shop_desc_EN:
Includes 270 commonly seen lumen plants. Highly recommended by the Lumen Association.

Besides visuals and plant descriptions, it also provides various common and medical uses. Great for experienced and novice users alike.
shop_desc_CHS:
收录270种龙脉常见花卉植物
龙脉协会诚心推荐
除了说明植物形态特征外，并提供应用方法及药用等信息，是本兼具观赏与实用的图鉴。

desc_EN: Official lumen intel sold by the Lumen Association. Without an excavation permit, it was difficult to purchase.
desc_CHS: 龙脉协会贩售的方位，没有探勘人的证照，还不得轻易购买。
shop_desc_EN:
Source: Lumen Association

Lumen information that has been thoroughly verified. Buyers must present their Lumen Association ID.
shop_desc_CHS:
情报提供者：龙脉协会
经证明后可靠消息，购买者请出具探勘人证明

desc_EN: Lumen intel that came from The Daily Lumen. No one knew what kind of cave we'd find...
desc_CHS: 来自龙脉日报的情报，不知道会找到什么样的龙脉。

desc_EN: Official lumen intel sold by the Lumen Association. Without an excavation permit, it was difficult to purchase.
desc_CHS: 龙脉协会贩售的方位，没有探勘人的证照，还不得轻易购买。
shop_desc_EN:
Source: Lumen Association

Lumen information that has been thoroughly verified. Buyers must present their Lumen Association ID.
shop_desc_CHS:
情报提供者：龙脉协会
经证明后可靠消息，购买者请出具探勘人证明

desc_EN: A starsong that had been copied countless times. It was so degraded the audio could hardly be made out. This sound seduced countless runners into the same perilous situation, but it was also what brought Eda and I together.
desc_CHS: 拷贝了不知道多少次，龙鸣声破碎而难以辨识，是这个声音诱导了无数探勘人受害，但也是让我遇到艾妲的声音。

desc_EN:
8 Orbis, 7 Circum, 24 Gradus
Praesidio Composes Thus

You have cut her throat, and defiled her corpse. Have ye forgotten that it was Terra's song which gave you eternal life? You shall pay for your grave sins in the pits of Excidium and none shall find her for hundreds of millions of years.

I will always remember this chilling inscription, right next to the mural of Excidium.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守谱于
八轮七天二十四地

汝等毁其尸首，割其喉，徒忘后土之歌照应生命百万，滔天恶罪，当葬大荒。后土将永远安葬，亿万年无人可寻。
...
我永远记得，大荒像旁边的万道碑文。

desc_EN:
5 Orbis, 2 Circum, 1 Gradus
Praesidio Composes Thus

The lumen are in turmoil, 
and the heavens blaze without end. 
Beg Helius to stop Terra's song, 
so that Ignis' fury might be quelled.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守谱于
五轮二天一地

天火不止，群脉动荡，
请乙皇令后土止歌，
以熄烛龙之怒。

desc_EN: Although Eda said her throat was damaged, and that she struggled with certain vocal techniques, this starsong was unlike the one I recorded when we first met. It was... grandiose, and bright. As if she was conjuring myths through an ancient hymn.
desc_CHS: 尽管艾妲说她喉咙受伤，不能完整换气，与我第一次遇到她时的声音不同，这次壮阔而明亮，仿佛唱出古老的神话。

desc_EN: The recording was murky, like a flurry of mixed emotions. It made me think of the Silk Oasis, where the surrounding areas were full of pirates and middlemen traders. It was almost like the stories of space came alive when Eda sang.
desc_CHS: 录制的声音混乱，思绪纷杂，让人联想到到丝洲附近，到处是海盗以及中间套利的交易人船队，艾妲是如此唱出了空域间的故事。

desc_EN: This time, Eda's voice sounded like the depths of a secluded valley. The murmurs of her voice trickled like a tragic brooklet.
desc_CHS: 艾妲这次的声音宛若走过低谷的丘壑，低语如涓滴细流，有点悲伤。

desc_EN: Eda's voice wandered about in the darkness, lacking in confidence, as if she was suppressing something.
desc_CHS: 艾妲那时的声音在幽暗中徘徊，始终没什么自信，仿佛压抑着什么。

desc_EN: As the years went by, Eda's singing progressed at an astonishing rate. Soon, she was able to imitate any starsong that she heard.
desc_CHS: 旅行几年来，艾妲的歌进步神速，渐渐的能模仿所有听见的龙鸣。

desc_EN: Her voice... it was like an unstable signal, hurried and unsettling.
desc_CHS:
艾妲的歌声变得像不稳定的讯号，
更急促...更不安。

desc_EN: The song seemed to rise up out of the abyss, embodying a grief like I'd never heard before.
desc_CHS: 歌声宛如从黑暗中升起，无比忧伤。

desc_EN: A witch's imitation of the starsong from deep within an asteroid, revealing a facet of the lumen it holds.
desc_CHS: 由女巫模仿，小行星深处的轰鸣声，反应出龙脉发生的过往今来。

desc_EN: A witch's imitation of the starsong from deep within an asteroid, revealing a facet of the lumen it holds.

desc_CHS: 矿业联合官方销售的方位，多半是已被挖掘殆尽的龙脉，矿联时不时会将这些情报释出于民间，保有一种开放性的假象。

desc_CHS: 黑市贩售的方位，通常只会找到一些开放探勘的二手龙脉，还有盗贼袭击的风险。

desc_EN:
Directions provided by Arrigo, a witch who had fled United Mining. They were most likely stolen from their database, which meant following through with them might be risky.

"Myria neverlasting, serve none but the flower within."

She left this message along with the directions, which let Eda know that Arrigo was one of her master's followers.
desc_CHS:
逃跑的女巫——艾琳达提供的龙脉方位，应该是由矿业联合数据库偷出来的，探勘多少会有点风险。

「万道无常，花开唯心」
她寄送方位时留下此言，艾妲才知道，对方也是受到她师父影响的女巫。

name_CHS: 方位：铁岚城汜气分布图
name_CHT: 方位：鐵嵐城汜氣分布圖
desc_EN: Lumen intel we got from Unity News. There was no way of telling what year it was from, so it was very likely that it lead to an excavated cave.
desc_CHS: 统合新闻台内部的龙脉方位情报，年份不明，极有可能是被探勘过的龙脉。

desc_EN: Lumen intel that came from The Daily Lumen. No one knew what kind of cave we'd find...
desc_CHS: 来自龙脉日报的情报，不知道会找到什么样的龙脉。

desc_EN:
9 Orbis, 3 Circum, 1 Gradus
Praesidio Composes Thus

I hereby command the Four Peaks,
to search for lumen flora,
so the Sanctums may gather them,
and send them to Excidium.
For I shall reforge her,
no matter how long it takes.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守谱于
九轮三天一地

仅令四山诸神广寻魂花，
众道集之，渡往大荒，
万轮内重炼后土之身。
shop_desc_EN: The intel markets are happy to purchase all sorts of documents. What looks like useless information might one day reveal some hidden treasures.

name_EN: Key Directions: United Mining Top Secret Mission
name_CHS: 重要方位：矿联机密任务
name_CHT: 重要方位：礦聯機密任務
desc_EN: The doctor would always say, "Maintaining a good relationship with United Mining to help runners is the association's main focus."
desc_CHS:
「一边协助探勘人，一边跟矿联政府交好，是我们协会最大的任务。」
医生常这么说。

name_CHS: 重要方位：黑龙探索任务
name_CHT: 重要方位：黑龍探索任務
desc_EN: At the time, no one in the crew was really excited about this. Even though Banshee could be right within our grasp, the atmosphere was suffocating.
desc_CHS: 当时团队没有任何人为这个消息兴奋，尽管黑龙可能在眼前，气氛却让我痛苦。

desc_EN: Lumen intel given to us by a runner who worshipped Bones. The Bones Brigade was pretty tough on outsiders, but they were very respected among the Peaks.
desc_CHS: 崇拜白牙的探勘人送给我们的方位，白帮虽然对外地人不好，但群山人却非常尊敬他们。

desc_EN: Back then, I had a hard time trusting any intel that came from a capybara...
desc_CHS: 只要是来自水豚的方位情报，当时多少有点不放心...

desc_EN: A set of directions that came with records of ship traffic. Identifying some suspicious traffic patterns could lead to some lumen.
desc_CHS: 记录来往船只情报的方位，可以推算出可疑的交通位置，找出龙脉。

desc_EN:
2 Orbis, 10 Circum, 13 Gradus
Praesidio Composes Thus

Obeying Helius' commandment,
the Ten Peaks erected eighty-eight shrines,
instructing the Sanctums to sing and inhale,
the lumen for life eternal.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守谱于
二轮十天十三地

十山诸神尊乙皇命，
建八十八龙脉神殿，
并令众道行歌，引气延命。
shop_desc_EN: The intel markets are happy to purchase all sorts of documents. What looks like useless information might one day reveal some hidden treasures.

desc_EN:
4 Orbis, 4 Circum, 8 Gradus
Praesidio Composes Thus

I sing once, to offer one hundred caves from afar to Ignis.
Ignis roars, and the Sanctums begin anew. 

I sing again, to offer one thousand caves from afar to Ignis.
Ignis roars, and the Sanctums live on.
desc_CHS:
万道龙守谱于
四轮四天八地

愿歌一轮，献河外三百龙脉予烛龙，
烛龙轰鸣，已故众道再起。

愿歌二轮，献河外五千龙脉予烛龙，
烛龙轰鸣，众道不死续命。

name_EN: Loose Pages from a Terra Hymnal 1
desc_EN:
A songbook with a lot of missing pages, which were likely used to start a fire.

Given the decline of the Terra faith, these songbooks were hard to come by. However, there were plenty of antique dealers who believed the verses contained mysterious powers that could channel lumen.

It also appeared to contain decipherments of Myrian inscriptions.
desc_CHS:
歌谱残缺，应该是被拿去做燃料。
由于后土的信仰式微，歌本这几年已经很少见，但群山依然有不少古董商，相信解译这些乐句，就有力量引导龙脉。

似乎记载着万道符文解译的方法。

desc_EN:
A machine for calibrating military vocalizers.

During training, Eda's master would ask her to sing the starsong of Ignis, then give the recording to the Lumen Association. If the association did not purchase it, that meant she didn't sing well enough. It took her many years to be accepted by the market and her master.

The thought of people paying for her voice really embarrassed her.
desc_CHS:
校正军用发声器的机器。

练习时，艾妲师父会请她反覆哼唱太阳烛龙的声音，再把录制的声音交给协会，如果协会不收购，就代表唱得不好。她花了很多年，才慢慢让市场与师父认同。

一想到很多人可能买到她的声音过，她就觉得很不好意思。

desc_EN:
An expression of friendship and gratitude, the brooch emitted an ice-blue aura and was made of highly refined lumen metal. Holding it in my hands, I could feel it resonating. 

"You'll need this one day," Rodin said as he gave this to us.
desc_CHS:
作为友谊与感谢的证明，散发着冰蓝色的发光胸针，是由纯度最高的汜金属凝练而成，握在手中都能感觉到歌声的震动。

有一天，你一定会用到它，罗登对我们说。
shop_desc_EN: In the Peaker markets, you can find a buyer for anything if you have the right contact.

desc_EN:
8506, Galactic Calendar

"Initially, all I wanted was to fight for the rights of Thousand Peaks. That was until the fleet of witches destroyed our cave..."

This book was popular in the asteroid belt for a long time, and was written by one of the founders of the Lumen War Relief Foundation. A veteran mercenary that participated in a lot of guerrilla warfare... all he wanted now was peace.
desc_CHS:
银河历8506
最早我们只是想争取群山人的权益，直到女巫队毁灭了我们的矿场...

这书似乎在小行星带流传已久，作者是抚恤会的创办人之一，曾是前星环自由战线的佣兵，参与过大小零星的游击战役，如今只渴望和平。

desc_EN:
This text primarily describes how Helius and the other gods worked together to build the lumen Empire. 

Helius is known as the deity who created the Myrian Empire. He fought against the omnipotent Ignis for the good of the gods, and this romantic nature made him beloved by adventurers and scientists alike. As such, he is believed to represent the pursuit of progress.
desc_CHS:
书中记载的是「乙皇」如何与诸神合作，建立龙脉帝国的故事。

乙皇被公认是打造万道帝国的最高神，也是愿意为了神明福祉，与绝对神烛龙争斗的浪漫神明，特别为冒险家、科学家们喜爱，认为代表追求进步的动力。
shop_desc_EN: Written by the asteroid belt adventurer James Wong, most of the source material comes from Helius inscriptions uncovered in Myrian remains.
shop_desc_CHS: 由小行星带的冒险家「詹姆斯・王」所著，内容多半由来于万道龙脉遗迹中，出土的乙皇建国碑文。

name_EN: Taiyang Decree of Conferment to the Lee Clan
desc_EN:
As the Cosmos bears witness,
Taiyang has granted this to East Ocean.
Protecting us into eternity,
the Lee clan here abodes.
[8506 GC, Year 142 of the East Ocean calendar]

The Lee clan's place of residence during the Lumen War. After East Ocean was kicked out by United Mining, no one dared mention it. Even I only read about it in historical records of the family.
desc_CHS:
宇宙见证，领受太乙，
基业永守，鸢家钦此。
银河历 8506，瀛海天台142 标准年。

是家族于龙脉冲突时期，经营的群山定居点，被矿业联合赶出去后，族中无人愿意提起，连我都只有于族史中读到。

desc_EN:
I have no idea how Eda avoided all the security cameras. Before leaving, she sprayed the flower that symbolized her master. What hurt her the most wasn't the pain and suffering caused by United Mining, but the fact that they took her master away, and did not give her the honor she deserved.

Her master may have been responsible for the loss of many lives, but she did save Eda.
desc_CHS:
艾妲不知怎么躲过摄像头，临走前喷了象征她师父的花。相比矿联造成的苦难，她更介意将师父抢走的矿联，没赐予她师父应有的荣耀。

就算是刽子手，她还是拯救艾妲的师父。

desc_EN:
"Melody of Starsong" is an opera about a love between two gods, written by the Rodin family after years of gathering archaeological research. 

The first act describes the birth of Helius from the fires of Ignis, and how he was ordered to watch the Peaks from the void, drifting aimlessly for millennia, tormented and alone. One day, he was drawn in by a mysterious voice: "Where there is song, you shall find me." 

Terra, one of the gods, gazed at Helius from afar, hoping to save him with her song. Eventually, he came down from the heavens for her and they fell in love, establishing the Myrian Empire.
desc_CHS:
龙脉长歌是罗登家族搜集大量考古数据后，杜撰的神明爱情歌剧。

上部故事是，乙皇于烛龙的星火诞生后，为烛龙授命，于虚空看望群山，漂泊亿万年为孤独折磨，一日却为某个声音吸引：

「有歌的地方，你就会找到我。」

那是神明之一的后土，遥望乙皇的她，渴望用歌拯救对方，终于乙皇为她降世，彼此相恋，建立了万道帝国。

desc_EN:
The book recounted the tale of the failed assassination attempt by the Rumani Clan. The chieftain's daughter was said to have been gifted with stunning eyes and beautiful locks. Her duties lay heavy on her shoulders, yet she fatefully fell in love with the chairman, her target, and they eventually bore an illegitimate child.

The princess was punished according to the laws of the clan, but her daughter was taken away and lost in the chaos of war, never to be found.
desc_CHS:
里面记载的是吉普赛家族策动暗杀计划的始末，族长的女儿是一位有着美丽金发与眼眸的女子，她身负重任，却爱上了目标对象，跟矿业联合的议长私通款曲。甚至产下一女。

尽管最后公主被族内处刑，但她的女儿却在战乱时被接走，不知所终。

desc_EN:
99 Hybrid Lumium
Manufacturer: United Lumium Refinery

Eda said that United Mining's refined lumium was different from the lumen naturally found in caves. Even when she concentrated, she couldn't hear any emotion... Like some vital part of the lumen had been removed.
desc_CHS:
99级高纯度混合汜气
制造：矿联汜气精炼厂
...
艾妲说，矿联特殊精炼过的汜气，跟龙脉天然蕴藏的不ㄧ样，就算集中注意去聆听，也听不出汜里面的情感，仿佛有什么重要的东西被剔除了。
shop_desc_EN: In the Peaker markets, you can find a buyer for anything if you have the right contact.

desc_EN:
The Ten Peaks represented the spirit of pluralism and freedom, the motto of the Daily Lumen.

"To thank the Red Chamber Crew, we honor them with this inscription."
desc_CHS:
十山诸神代表了多元与自由精神，那是日报成立的愿景。

「感谢红楼船队对龙脉日报的协助。特奉此碑。」
shop_desc_EN: In the Peaker markets, you can find a buyer for anything if you have the right contact.
shop_desc_CHS: 在群山的市场上，只要有门道，几乎什么东西都能找到收购者。

desc_EN: The Witching Tower drafted a proposal to cooperate with United Mining once more, signing a contract to help search for lumen. This unprecedented resolution would forever solidify United Mining's position. I could tell that Eda had mixed feelings about it.
desc_CHS: 巫塔提案与矿联再次合作，签订探索龙脉的契约，这破天荒的提案将永久巩固矿联的地位，看在艾妲的眼中是五味杂陈。

desc_EN:
"Conference Schedule
- Lumium static: How irregular patterns of consciousness destroys refinement quality and how to deal with it."

A presentation issued for a conference that highlighted United Mining's never-ending quest for the lumen of Thousand Peaks.
desc_CHS:
议程
- 论汜的杂音调整，如何去除不规则意识扰动，提高精炼品质

研讨会发下的简报，解释了矿联对群山龙脉的无尽渴求。

desc_EN:
The register contained a list of witches who were drafted into the war, as well as an account book containing each witch's stipend. 

Eda looked silently for her name, which she found with a line next to it that read: "Unable to sing. Giving up for adoption."

The line was crossed out in red. And a second note was written underneath it: "Adopter - Red Grant"
desc_CHS:
名册内是当年女巫参加战事的名单，还有每个人的战时辅助金额的帐目。

艾妲默默找到她的名字，旁边一行纪录
「无歌者，予以弃养。」被红字划掉。

取代而之的注解是：
「认养者：红・葛兰特。」

desc_EN:
Records commemorating Class 4 of the Witching Tower

8519 - Stargazing Festival
8520 - Witches' Singing Practice
8521 - Level 4 Advancement Exam

A digital collection of photographs. Eda just stared at the photos for what seemed like eternity. At last, her gaze stopped, glued to a line of words:

8523 - Group Photo w/ Red from the Council of Elders
desc_CHS:
仅此纪念巫塔第四届女巫培训
摄于8519- 观星节
摄于8520- 女巫歌法实习
摄于8521- 四楼升等考试
...
那是数位的相片数据集锦，艾妲看着照片陷入沉思，最后视线停在两行字上：

摄于8523
长老院女巫「红」与全员合影

desc_EN:
A recording by James Wong, a famous Myrian explorer.

"I'm sure you're very excited to have found my recording. As long as you keep searching for lumen, you will always find me one step ahead.

Recently I've been learning from the witches, inhaling the lumen and reacting to it... It's fantastic... I close my eyes and I can almost sense the location of shrines nearby..."
desc_CHS:
录音的来源是詹姆斯・王
有名的万道探险家
...
捡到我录音的你，高兴吧，只要你继续寻找龙脉，我永远会在你前面。

我最近学着女巫，使用吸食汜的方式，让自己感应龙脉...
很棒的方法...我几乎闭起眼睛，就能感受到神殿的位置...
shop_desc_EN: The intel markets are happy to purchase all sorts of documents. What looks like useless information might one day reveal some hidden treasures.

name_CHS: 座标：铁岚城边境巡逻局
name_CHT: 座標：鐵嵐城邊境巡邏局
desc_EN: Wherever Red Chamber was, that was my home. That's what I realized during my stay at border patrol, after being rescued.
desc_CHS:
只要红楼在的地方，就是我的家，
从边境巡逻局获救时，我这么想着。

desc_EN: As we journeyed around the Peaks, we would occasionally receive SOS signals. But given the inordinate amount of scammers and pirates, attempting a rescue was something you had to think thrice about.
desc_CHS: 在群山旅行，不时空域会收发到求救的讯号，但由于诈骗与海盗众多，救援变成需要三思的事情。
游戏不显示
